articles.title: iPSC-Based Manufacture vs. Autologous Model Production Costs Examined via Financial Analysis
articles.summary:
Decoupling production from the patient and stem cell donors via a universal master cell bank lets NK cell therapy manufacturers slash COGS, simplify logistics, and reduce patient attrition.
The post iPSC-Based Manufacture vs. Autologous Model Production Costs Examined via Financial Analysis appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过财务分析比较iPSC通用型与自体模型在NK细胞疗法生产中的成本差异。结果表明，基于iPSC通用主细胞库的生产模式可显著降低生产成本、简化物流流程并减少患者流失，为细胞疗法的产业化提供重要经济性参考。

articles.title: Inducible, split base editors for in vivo cancer functional genomics
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03077-5Inducible base editors enhance cancer genomic screens in vivo.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了可诱导分裂型碱基编辑器，用于体内癌症功能基因组学研究。该系统通过时空控制基因编辑，显著增强了对癌症驱动基因和耐药机制的筛选能力，为创新癌症治疗策略的开发提供了重要工具平台。

articles.title: An inducible base editing platform for cancer functional genomics in vivo
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03079-3We developed a functional genomics platform using a small-molecule-controllable base editor that enables gene editing with reduced cellular toxicity and minimal transcriptional perturbation. The resulting high efficiency of the method potentiates in vivo inducible genetic screening, allowing systematic identification of critical residues in cancer therapeutic targets.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种小分子可控碱基编辑器，通过降低细胞毒性和转录干扰实现高效基因编辑。该平台支持体内诱导型遗传筛选，可系统识别癌症治疗靶点中的关键残基，为创新药物靶点发现提供重要工具。

articles.title: Cell-type-targeted mitochondrial transplantation rescues cell degeneration
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10391-0MitoCatch is a cell-type-specific mitochondrion-targeting system that links mitochondria and the cell surface by protein binders and delivers mitochondria into the target cell.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了MitoCatch系统，通过蛋白质连接器实现细胞类型特异性线粒体靶向和递送，能够将线粒体精确输送到目标细胞中。这项技术为治疗线粒体功能障碍相关疾病提供了创新疗法，在基因治疗和细胞治疗领域具有重要应用价值。

articles.title: mRNA vaccines engage unconventional pathways in CD8<sup>+</sup> T cell priming
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10353-6mRNA–lipid-nanoparticle vaccines do not require type 1 conventional dendritic (cDC1) cells or the WDFY4-dependent cross-presentation pathway for CD8+ T cell priming but, instead, engage both cDC1 and cDC2 cells redundantly.
articles.chinese_summary: Nature研究揭示mRNA-LNP疫苗通过非常规途径激活CD8+ T细胞：不依赖传统cDC1细胞和WDFY4交叉呈递通路，而是冗余利用cDC1和cDC2细胞进行抗原呈递。这一发现革新了对mRNA疫苗免疫机制的理解，为优化疫苗设计提供新靶点。

articles.title: Ultra-sensitive FLORA-seq links cell-type-specific tRNAome dynamics to differentiation trajectories guiding therapeutic suppressor tRNA candidate selection
articles.summary: Mammalian genomes encode hundreds of tRNA genes, but the role of individual tRNAs in development and cell identity remains unclear. Here, we introduce FLORA-seq, a method for simultaneous, low-input profiling of tRNAs, tRNA-derived RNAs (tdRs) and their modifications from as few as 5-20 cells. Applying FLORA-seq to mouse hematopoiesis revealed 50 high-variance isodecoders whose expression profiles recapitulate known hematopoietic cell types and correlate with differentiation trajectories. At the
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了FLORA-seq技术，能够从少量细胞中分析tRNA表达谱。应用于小鼠造血系统研究，发现特定tRNA异构体与细胞分化轨迹相关，为开发治疗性抑制tRNA候选药物提供了新策略，在基因治疗和精准医疗领域具有创新意义。

articles.title: Novel Targets for Complex Cancer Revealed by Genetic Regulatory Node Mapping
articles.summary:
By tracking gene regulation in single cells over time, PerturbFate can systematically map how diverse disease-associated genetic variations reshape cells to understand complex diseases, like cancer.
The post Novel Targets for Complex Cancer Revealed by Genetic Regulatory Node Mapping appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过单细胞基因调控时序追踪技术PerturbFate，系统绘制疾病相关遗传变异如何重塑细胞的调控节点图谱，揭示癌症等复杂疾病的新型治疗靶点。该研究为创新药物开发（特别是基因疗法和精准医疗）提供关键分子机制支持。

articles.title: Biopharma Adopting AI Despite Remaining GMP Compliance Questions
articles.summary:
AI is streamlining and accelerating process development and manufacturing, but more work is needed to understand how best to use the technology in compliance with the strict drug production rules.  
The post Biopharma Adopting AI Despite Remaining GMP Compliance Questions appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨生物制药行业在GMP合规问题尚未完全解决的情况下采用AI技术加速工艺开发和生产的现状。重点分析了AI在优化生物制造流程中的应用潜力与合规挑战，与生物制造领域高度相关，同时涉及创新药开发的生产环节。

articles.title: Ultra- and Diafiltration Clear Leachables Effectively
articles.summary:
A new study reveals that ultrafiltration and diafiltration can remove over 98% of leachables from biologics, offering crucial insights and predictive tools that strengthen safety assessments and improve confidence in downstream bioprocessing performance.
The post Ultra- and Diafiltration Clear Leachables Effectively appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 最新研究表明，超滤和透析过滤技术可有效去除生物制品中98%以上的浸出物。该研究提供了关键见解和预测工具，能显著加强生物制品安全性评估，并提升下游生物工艺性能的可控性，对生物制造领域具有重要应用价值。

articles.title: Artificial allosteric protein switches with machine-learning-designed receptors
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03081-9Allosteric biosensors are constructed by combining reporter proteins with machine-learning-designed receptor domains.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过将报告蛋白与机器学习设计的受体结构域结合，构建人工变构蛋白开关。该技术可应用于创新药物开发中的生物传感器设计，为精准医疗提供新型检测工具，同时在合成生物学领域具有生物制造潜力。

articles.title: Template-driven scaffolding of SCF<sup>FBXO42</sup> regulates PP2A degradation
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10368-zThe E3 ligase SCFFBXO42 degrades holoenzyme-free PP2Ac in complex with the coiled-coil protein CCDC6 to maintain cancer cell fitness
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示SCF<sup>FBXO42</sup> E3连接酶通过CCDC6介导的模板驱动支架机制降解PP2A催化亚基，维持癌细胞适应性。该机制为开发靶向蛋白降解疗法提供了新靶点，对创新抗癌药物研发具有重要启示。

articles.title: A mechanism for adaptive genome regulation in cancer
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10269-1In this Perspective article, a theoretical framework for how the AP-1 family of transcription factors mediates cellular adaptation in cancer drug resistance is proposed.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文提出AP-1转录因子家族介导癌细胞适应性耐药的理论框架，揭示了肿瘤基因组调控新机制。该研究为开发克服耐药性的创新疗法（如靶向转录因子药物）提供理论基础，与创新药研发高度相关。

articles.title: Giant cancer study reveals effectiveness of ‘off label’ treatments
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01241-0Genomics-guided trial could increase options for people undergoing cancer therapy — plus, a landmark ancient-genome study reveals natural selection in hundreds of human genes.
articles.chinese_summary: 这项发表于《自然》的大型癌症研究通过基因组学指导的临床试验，揭示了‘超适应症’治疗在癌症治疗中的有效性。研究为接受癌症治疗的患者提供了更多治疗选择，同时通过古基因组研究揭示了数百个人类基因的自然选择过程，对精准医疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: Nature's antivenom: Combinations of conserved rattlesnake serum metalloproteinase inhibitors block the lethal action of viper venoms
articles.summary: Snakebite maims or kills several hundred thousand people each year. For more than a century, treatment has relied on antivenoms derived from animals immunized with whole venoms, but their efficacy, safety, and availability are highly variable, and it is often not well understood which specific venom components must be inhibited to prevent mortality and major morbidities. New therapeutic approaches are needed. here, we take an evolutionary approach to antivenom design inspired by the longstanding
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过进化方法开发新型抗蛇毒血清，利用响尾蛇血清金属蛋白酶抑制剂组合中和毒蛇毒素。该策略突破传统抗蛇毒血清局限，为蛇伤治疗提供创新疗法，属于创新药物研发范畴。

articles.title: Opinion: Medical schools must continue to teach students about structural barriers to care
articles.summary: “Patients don’t experience illness in a vacuum,” writes Uché Blackstock.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文强调医学院应继续教授医疗结构性障碍知识，指出患者健康状况受社会结构因素影响。这直接关联大健康领域的医疗公平和公共卫生，但对创新药和生物制造领域无直接相关性。

articles.title: Opinion: Hosting the ‘intellectual wrestling match’ between MAHA, public health
articles.summary: “These sides aren't talking to each other. And there's a lot riding on it”: the podcast trying to bridge MAHA and public health.
articles.chinese_summary: 该文章聚焦医疗人文与公共卫生之间的对话隔阂，通过播客平台搭建MAHA（医疗人文与艺术）与公共卫生领域的沟通桥梁。虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对大健康领域的跨学科协作、公共卫生政策制定具有重要启示意义。

articles.title: STAT+: AI could check millions of CT scans for heart risk. Who will pay for it?
articles.summary: New AI tools could screen existing CT scans to asses risk for heart disease. But, who'll pay for it, and will it improve health outcomes?
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨AI分析CT扫描评估心脏病风险的技术应用，核心关注点在于医疗支付模式和临床效果验证。虽涉及创新技术，但重点在于医疗体系落地挑战，与大健康领域的精准医疗和公共卫生高度相关。

articles.title: STAT+: New Bain biotech startup, building on BMS drugs, gets a name and a CEO
articles.summary: Beeline Medicine is focused on development of five inflammatory and immune disorder drugs, starting with a potential daily pill for lupus.
articles.chinese_summary: Beeline Medicine是一家新成立的生物技术初创公司，专注于开发五种炎症和免疫疾病药物，首推项目为潜在的红斑狼疮每日口服药。该公司基于百时美施贵宝的药物进行研发，属于创新药领域。

articles.title: STAT+: A $15 AI test, Project Glasswing, and how Doctronic pilot blindsided Utah medical board
articles.summary: In this edition of STAT's AI Prognosis: A $15 AI test, what Project Glasswing means for health care, and an update on Doctronic's AI pilot in Utah.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章聚焦AI医疗应用，涉及15美元AI检测、医疗AI项目Glasswing及犹他州AI试点与医疗委员会的监管冲突。虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对大健康领域的数字医疗发展和监管挑战具有重要参考价值。

articles.title: STAT+: CMS proposes rolling back breakthrough device payment flexibilities
articles.summary: CMS is proposing to repeal a pathway that allows breakthrough devices to get supplementary payments.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国CMS提议取消突破性医疗器械的补充支付途径，这一政策变化将影响创新医疗器械的市场准入和商业化进程，间接关联大健康领域的医疗支付体系与技术创新推广。

articles.title: Emergence of oncofetal plasticity is ubiquitous in early colorectal cancers
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10344-7Metastasis-associated oncofetal cell states emerge at the earliest stages of colorectal cancer and spatial profiling shows stereotypic patterning of fibroblast subtypes resembling normal tissue architecture, resulting in distinct regional microenvironments that dictate the timing and positioning of oncofetal plasticity.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现癌胎可塑性在结直肠癌早期普遍出现，空间分析显示成纤维细胞亚型呈现类似正常组织的固定模式，形成不同区域微环境决定癌胎可塑性的时空分布。该发现为癌症精准治疗提供了新的生物学见解。

articles.title: A spatial atlas of the healthy human liver from live donors
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10377-yA human spatial atlas of gene expression in liver based on live donors shows marked porto–central zonation of hepatocytes and non-parenchymal cells, and transcriptomic changes in early steatosis.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究基于活体供体构建了人类肝脏空间基因表达图谱，揭示了肝细胞与非实质细胞显著的porto-central分区特征，以及早期脂肪变性中的转录组变化。这项基础研究为理解肝脏生理和疾病机制提供了重要资源，对精准医学具有潜在价值。

articles.title: Prospective evaluation of genomics-guided off-label treatment
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10405-xEvaluation by the Drug Rediscovery Protocol of off-label use of 37 approved cancer drugs on 1,610 patients showed modest activities overall, although subgroups of responders suggest that off-label drug use could be beneficial in tandem with more stringent biomarker selection.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究前瞻性评估了37种已上市癌症药物的超说明书基因组指导治疗。在1610名患者中显示总体疗效有限，但特定生物标志物筛选的应答亚组表明，结合严格生物标志物选择的超说明书用药可能获益，为精准医疗提供新策略。

articles.title: Tumour promotion through the lens of evolution
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10386-xThis Review revisits tumour initiation and promotion in light of clonal diversity and the presence of cancer driver mutations in normal tissues, aiming to understand mechanisms that enable environmental and endogenous factors to expand tumorigenic clones.
articles.chinese_summary: 这篇综述从进化角度重新审视肿瘤发生过程，聚焦于正常组织中癌驱动突变的存在与克隆多样性。文章探讨环境及内源性因素如何促进致癌克隆扩张的机制，为理解肿瘤进化规律和开发新型干预策略提供理论基础。

articles.title: Author Correction: HER2 expression identifies dynamic functional states within circulating breast cancer cells
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10519-2Author Correction: HER2 expression identifies dynamic functional states within circulating breast cancer cells
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志的作者更正，研究通过HER2表达识别循环乳腺癌细胞中的动态功能状态。该发现对理解肿瘤转移机制、开发针对循环肿瘤细胞的创新疗法具有重要价值，与癌症精准医疗高度相关。

articles.title: Editorial Expression of Concern: Creation of human tumour cells with defined genetic elements
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10504-9Editorial Expression of Concern: Creation of human tumour cells with defined genetic elements
articles.chinese_summary: 本文涉及通过特定遗传元件创建人类肿瘤细胞的技术，与创新药开发高度相关。该研究为肿瘤机制研究和新药筛选提供重要模型，但需关注其伦理合规性。对基因治疗和精准医疗领域具有参考价值。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA panel will meet to discuss allowing broader access to certain peptides
articles.summary: The FDA will convene an outside panel of advisers to discuss whether to allow compounding pharmacies to manufacture certain peptides
articles.chinese_summary: FDA将召集外部顾问小组讨论是否允许复方药房生产特定肽类药物。这涉及药物生产监管政策的调整，与生物制造领域的生产规范和质量控制密切相关，但对创新药研发和大健康领域的直接影响有限。

articles.title: Structure-centric searching enables global mapping of the public metabolome
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03082-8StructureMASST enables pan-repository MS/MS searches using a chemical name or structure.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文开发了StructureMASST技术，可通过化学名称或结构进行跨数据库MS/MS搜索，实现公共代谢组数据的全局映射。该工具虽不直接涉及创新药研发，但为代谢物鉴定提供了重要技术支持，对生物标志物发现和精准医学具有潜在价值。

articles.title: Identification of cellular double-stranded RNAs in mammalian embryonic stem cells
articles.summary: Antiviral defence mechanisms are typically activated upon sensing virus-derived nucleic acids. During replication, viruses generate double-stranded RNA (dsRNA) intermediates that the innate immune system can sense, triggering several defence pathways. Conversely, mammalian cells avoid accumulating their own endogenous dsRNA to prevent activating these defence mechanisms. However, we demonstrate that mammalian embryonic stem cells (ESCs) accumulate endogenous dsRNA without activating these respon
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现哺乳动物胚胎干细胞会积累内源性双链RNA，但不会激活抗病毒防御机制。这一发现揭示了干细胞独特的免疫调控特性，为理解细胞分化、自身免疫疾病及病毒防御机制提供了新视角，但与创新药、生物制造和大健康的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Ancient DNA reveals pervasive directional selection across West Eurasia
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10358-1Analysis of 15,836 ancient West Eurasian genomes reveals hundreds of instances of directional selection, showing that sustained changes in allele frequency were widespread, rather than being rare over this period as previously assumed.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过分析15,836个古代西 Eurasian 基因组，研究发现定向选择事件普遍存在，改变了人们对过去等位基因频率变化罕见性的认知。该研究主要涉及群体遗传学和进化生物学领域，与创新药、生物制造和大健康的直接关联有限，但为理解人类疾病相关基因的进化历史提供了基础科学背景。

articles.title: Avanos Medical Set to be Acquired in $1.272B Private Equity Deal
articles.summary: Avanos Medical goes private in $1.272 billion acquisition by AIP, joining a growing list of medtech companies choosing private equity ownership.
articles.chinese_summary: Avanos Medical将以12.72亿美元被私募股权AIP收购并私有化，成为选择私募股权所有的医疗科技公司之一。该交易主要涉及医疗器械领域，与创新药、生物制造等核心生物医药领域关联度较低，属于大健康范畴的医疗设备行业并购活动。

articles.title: AIP to acquire Avanos Medical in $1.27B go-private deal
articles.summary: Avanos Medical generated $701.2 million last year from sectors where it competes with Boston Scientific, Medtronic and Stryker.
articles.chinese_summary: AIP以12.7亿美元收购Avanos Medical并使其私有化。Avanos去年在医疗器械领域营收7.012亿美元，与波士顿科学、美敦力等公司竞争。该交易主要涉及医疗器械行业整合，与创新药和生物制造直接关联有限。

articles.title: STAT+: Flawed study on the antidepressant Paxil came with a cautionary note — if you knew how to find it
articles.summary: When scientific journals publish expressions of concerns, they have an obligation to do so prominently, Ed Silverman writes.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论抗抑郁药帕罗西汀研究中存在的缺陷及期刊警示通知的透明度问题，主要涉及临床研究的科学诚信与出版伦理，与大健康领域的医疗监管和公共卫生相关，但与创新药研发或生物制造的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Trump DOJ report says Biden administration treated anti-abortion protestors unfairly
articles.summary: New CDC tetanus shot analysis, AI scans for heart risk, and more health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: 文章涉及CDC破伤风疫苗分析和AI心脏风险评估等公共卫生议题，同时包含司法部关于反堕胎抗议者待遇的政治争议。内容主要聚焦公共卫生政策与医疗政治化问题，与创新药和生物制造领域关联度较低。

articles.title: Brainwide blood volume reflects opposing neural populations
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10350-9Combined functional ultrasound imaging and Neuropixels recording of mouse brains identify two neuronal populations with opposing arousal-related activity and distinct haemodynamic response functions, that occur throughout the brain.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过结合功能性超声成像和Neuropixels记录技术，在小鼠大脑中发现了两组与觉醒相关的对立神经元群体，它们具有不同的血流动力学响应函数。该发现主要推进基础神经科学认知，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Cytoplasmic lattices are megadalton storage complexes in mammalian oocytes
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10513-8Cytoplasmic lattices are megadalton storage complexes in mammalian oocytes
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示哺乳动物卵母细胞中的胞质晶格是兆道尔顿级别的蛋白质储存复合物。虽然为基础细胞生物学研究提供了重要突破，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限，主要对生殖生物学和早期发育机制有学术价值。

articles.title: STAT+: Novartis CEO joins Anthropic’s board
articles.summary: Revolution Medicines $2B fundraise, Structure's new hire hints at acquisition efforts, and more Readout biotech news
articles.chinese_summary: 诺华CEO加入AI公司Anthropic董事会，该新闻主要涉及生物科技行业动态与企业治理。虽与创新药和生物制造无直接关联，但反映了制药企业对人工智能技术的战略关注，可能间接影响未来药物研发方向。

articles.title: Linear RAG scanning mediates editing of Igκ variable region repertoires
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10362-5Studies explaining the secondary Igk recombination mechanism are described and Cer/Sis deletion and/or displacement is implicated as a developmental switch converting the rearrangement mechanisms from two-loop-based diffusional primary Igk into one-loop-based linear scanning secondary mechanisms.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了次级Igκ重组的分子机制，发现Cer/Sis缺失或置换可将重排机制从基于双环扩散的初级重组转换为基于单环线性扫描的次级重组。该发现深化了对B细胞抗体多样性生成机制的理解，属于基础免疫学研究范畴。

articles.title: Monolithic 3D integration of tantalum pentoxide nonlinear photonics
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10379-wMonolithic three-dimensional (3D) integration of tantalum pentoxide on a lithium niobate substrate enables scalable, multifunctional photonic systems and the incorporation of nonlinear optics directly into existing and emerging photonics infrastructure.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了在铌酸锂衬底上单片三维集成五氧化二钽的技术，实现了可扩展的多功能光子系统，并将非线性光学直接集成到现有光子基础设施中。该工作属于光子器件与集成光学领域，与生物医药的直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Carbonyl swapping converts cyclic ketones to saturated heterocycles
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10508-5Carbonyl swapping converts cyclic ketones to saturated heterocycles
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了一种将环状酮转化为饱和杂环的羰基交换新方法。该有机合成方法学虽具有合成价值，但与创新药物研发、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联度较低，主要作为基础化学研究为相关领域提供潜在的工具性支持。

articles.title: Identifying the topographic signature of early Martian oceans
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10381-2Shelves rather than shorelines may be better topographic indicators of oceans on Earth and Mars.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过分析地球和火星的地形特征，提出大陆架而非海岸线是识别古代海洋的更可靠指标。文章聚焦行星地质学，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康无直接关联，仅具基础科学研究价值。

articles.title: Johnson & Johnson MedTech Reports 4.6% Growth in Q1
articles.summary: Cardiovascular and surgical innovations drove J&J's medtech growth in the first quarter of 2026.

articles.title: CBP preps tariff refund portal for April 20 launch
articles.summary: The system will go live at 8 a.m. EDT to begin the electronic returns process for an estimated $127 billion in tariffs, the agency said Tuesday.

articles.title: Stereotaxis to buy Robocath for up to $45M
articles.summary: The deal combines Stereotaxis’ magnetic navigation technology and Robocath’s mechanical robotic system, strengthening Stereotaxis’ position in endovascular surgery, said CEO David Fischel.

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about FDA seeking more data on a Lilly obesity pill, a pharma 340B win, and more
articles.summary: The FDA asked Eli Lilly for more data on liver injury linked to its newly approved ​obesity pill, Foundayo

articles.title: Digital Twin Process Could Slash Microbial Protein Costs
articles.summary:
A digital twin of a fully continuous automated manufacturing process could slash the cost of microbial protein production by improving process design and optimization compared to traditional Design of Experiments.
The post Digital Twin Process Could Slash Microbial Protein Costs appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: Fujifilm Biotechnologies Opens New QC Lab in Denmark
articles.summary:
Construction of the lab was completed last month and subsequently received approval from the Danish Medicines Agency (DKMA) following an on-site inspection. Laboratory operations will begin in May 2026.
The post Fujifilm Biotechnologies Opens New QC Lab in Denmark appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: Pregnancy Sickness Study Identifies New Genetic Links
articles.summary:
A GWAS involving 10,000 women has identified 10 genes linked to the most severe form of pregnancy sickness, hyperemesis gravidarum, including six new genes, which researchers say may point to biological mechanisms behind the condition, and potential new treatment pathways. 
The post Pregnancy Sickness Study Identifies New Genetic Links appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: Rpd3L Coordinates Chromatin State and Transcription-Replication Conflict Resolution through H3K4 Methylation-Dependent and Independent Mechanisms
articles.summary: Faithful genome duplication requires coordination between transcription and replication. Disruption of this coordination causes transcription-replication conflicts (TRCs), leading to replication stress and genome instability. How chromatin regulators modulate these processes remains unclear. Here, we show that the Rpd3L histone deacetylase complex dynamically modulates chromatin state to control replication fork progression and buffer TRCs in Saccharomyces cerevisiae. Rpd3L is targeted through b

articles.title: Molecular basis for methylation-sensitive editing by Cas9
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10384-zThermoCas9, a genome-editing enzyme that is sensitive to the DNA methylation status of the target locus, is characterized and shows promise for targeting hypomethylated DNA regions in cancer cells.

articles.title: Retraction Note: The hidden fitness of the male zebra finch courtship song
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10483-xRetraction Note: The hidden fitness of the male zebra finch courtship song

articles.title: Regeneron, Telix Launch Up-to-$4.3B Cancer-Focused Radiopharma Drug, Diagnostic Collaboration
articles.summary:
The companies have agreed to partner on next-generation radiopharmaceutical therapies aimed at up-to-eight solid tumor targets from Regeneron’s portfolio of antibodies, generated from VelocImmune® technology, which uses the company’s own mouse platform engineered with a genetically humanized immune system.
The post Regeneron, Telix Launch Up-to-$4.3B Cancer-Focused Radiopharma Drug, Diagnostic Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Regeneron与Telix达成高达43亿美元合作，基于VelocImmune®抗体技术开发针对8种实体瘤的下一代放射性药物疗法及诊断方案。该合作结合抗体工程与放射性同位素技术，代表肿瘤靶向治疗的重要创新方向。

articles.title: CAR T Cell Therapy Biomanufactured by Cellares Infused Into First Two Patients
articles.summary:
The scalable biomanufacturing of autologous products to supply thousands of patients per year can potentially be achieved with minimal capital investment and a low cost of goods.
The post CAR T Cell Therapy Biomanufactured by Cellares Infused Into First Two Patients appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Cellares公司采用创新生物制造技术生产的CAR-T细胞疗法已完成首两例患者输注。该技术通过最小化资本投入和降低生产成本，实现了自体细胞产品的规模化生产，有望每年为数千患者提供治疗，推动细胞治疗的可及性。

articles.title: Engineered Miniature CRISPR Boosts Gene‑Editing Efficiency in Human Cells
articles.summary:
A newly characterized Cas12f nuclease shows strong editing in human cells. Researchers engineered a variant with markedly improved efficiency, advancing efforts toward compact genome editors suitable for targeted delivery.  
The post Engineered Miniature CRISPR Boosts Gene‑Editing Efficiency in Human Cells appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员开发出一种新型微型Cas12f核酸酶，在人类细胞中展现出强大的基因编辑能力。通过工程化改造显著提高了编辑效率，这一进展推动了适用于靶向递送的紧凑型基因组编辑器的发展，为基因治疗领域提供了重要工具。

articles.title: FXR and BET signaling orchestrate to protect β cells
articles.summary: In both type 1 and type 2 diabetes (T1D and T2D), insulin producing {beta} cells undergo progressive dysfunction due to inflammation, leading to impaired glucose responsiveness, dedifferentiation, and cell loss. While bile acid (BA) dysregulation under diabetic conditions is known to influence metabolic and inflammatory pathways, its mechanistic role in {beta} cell regulation remains incompletely defined. Here we show that bile acid sensor Farnesoid X receptor (FXR) and Bromodomain and Extra-Ter
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示胆汁酸受体FXR与BET信号在糖尿病中协同保护β细胞免受炎症损伤的机制。通过阐明这一新型信号通路，为开发针对β细胞功能障碍的创新疗法提供了潜在靶点，主要涉及创新药物开发领域。

articles.title: FDA’s AI Device Regulations: Key Updates & Compliance Strategies for Medtech Success
articles.summary: In the past 18 months, the FDA has outlined clear guidelines for designing, documenting, updating, and monitoring AI-powered medical devices. Industry experts define how to comply with these new updates.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA在过去18个月内发布了AI医疗设备的明确监管指南，涵盖设计、文档、更新和监控等环节。文章由行业专家解读如何遵守这些新规，虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对医疗科技领域的大健康应用具有重要指导意义。

articles.title: From Silos to Integration: FDA’s Framework for Digital & Intelligent Devices
articles.summary: Technological advancements in the medical device industry have ushered in a new era of regulatory expectations, emphasizing continuous, risk-based compliance across quality systems, cybersecurity, and AI/ML-enabled devices.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨FDA对数字化和智能医疗器械的监管框架转型，强调质量体系、网络安全及人工智能设备的持续风险管理。虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对大健康领域的医疗器械监管和精准医疗发展具有重要指导意义。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about an FDA push for trial transparency, a Novo-OpenAI deal, and more
articles.summary: The FDA told more than 2,200 companies and researchers that they are required to report clinical trial results, or they may face fines
articles.chinese_summary: FDA向2200多家企业和研究人员强调必须报告临床试验结果，否则可能面临罚款。此举旨在提升临床试验透明度，虽不直接涉及药物研发技术，但对创新药的监管环境和数据公开具有重要影响。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA pressures drugmakers to report trial results
articles.summary: Ben Sasse on enrolling in Rev Med's drug trial, more ADC investment, and other biotech news from The Readout
articles.chinese_summary: FDA正加强对制药商的监管压力，要求及时报告临床试验结果。文章涉及Rev Med公司药物试验案例，并提及抗体药物偶联物(ADC)领域的投资动态，反映了创新药研发领域的监管环境与产业发展趋势。

articles.title: Fine-tuning m6A and METTL3 levels have profound impact on cellular proliferation and protein synthesis
articles.summary: The RNA modification m6A is the most abundant internal RNA modification in eukaryotic mRNAs and long non-coding RNAs and has been implicated in diverse and important biological processes. Notably, m6A has been associated with both pro and anti-tumorigenic roles depending on cellular and biological context. In basal-like triple negative breast cancer (TNBC), heterozygous loss of the m6A methyltransferase METTL3 and increased levels of the m6A demethylase FTO are associated with poor prognosis and
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨m6A RNA修饰及其甲基转移酶METTL3在细胞增殖和蛋白质合成中的调控作用。在三阴性乳腺癌中，METTL3杂合缺失与不良预后相关，揭示了RNA表观遗传调控在肿瘤发生中的关键机制，为开发新型RNA靶向疗法提供了理论基础。

articles.title: STAT+: Maryland state affordability board sets its first price cap for a medicine
articles.summary: The board will now oversee a process to lower the cost of the type 2 diabetes medicine Jardiance by January 2027.
articles.chinese_summary: 马里兰州可负担性委员会首次对2型糖尿病药物Jardiance设定价格上限，要求2027年前降低其成本。此举反映了药品定价政策对大健康领域的影响，但未涉及药物创新或生物制造技术本身。

articles.title: STAT+: Hospitals offer chatbots to fight off ChatGPT
articles.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: Hospitals offer their own chatbots, Medicare's ACCESS pilot, and an update Utah's 'AI doctor' experiment.
articles.chinese_summary: 医院开始提供自有聊天机器人服务以应对ChatGPT的普及，同时报道了医疗保险AI试点和犹他州'AI医生'实验进展。文章聚焦医疗机构对AI技术的应用，属于大健康领域的数字健康创新。

articles.title: Optimizing data quality and completeness in visual proteomics experiments
articles.summary: Cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) is fast developing from a tool primarily used to investigate structures of individual macromolecular complexes in situ into a high-resolution probe for molecular processes within diverse functional contexts in intact cells. It is thus increasingly necessary that the data are analyzed and quantified as completely as possible. But annotating and structurally characterizing macromolecular complexes with a high degree of completeness is a significant challenge, esp
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨冷冻电子断层扫描技术在可视蛋白质组学实验中优化数据质量和完整性的方法。虽然该技术能原位解析细胞内分子结构，但主要聚焦于数据分析和结构表征的技术挑战，与创新药和生物制造的关联较弱，属于基础研究方法学范畴。

articles.title: Fast and accurate multiple-protein-sequence alignment at scale with FAMSA2
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 14 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03095-3FAMSA2 accurately aligns millions of protein sequences at high speed.
articles.chinese_summary: FAMSA2是一种快速准确的多蛋白序列比对算法，可在短时间内处理数百万条序列。该工具虽不直接涉及药物开发或生物制造，但为蛋白质功能研究和生物信息学分析提供了重要技术支持，间接服务于大健康领域的精准医疗和基础研究。

articles.title: MD&M South Unveils Industry Partners
articles.summary: MD&M South Strengthens innovation across various sectors with key association partnerships.
articles.chinese_summary: MD&M South展会宣布行业合作伙伴关系，旨在加强各领域创新。虽聚焦医疗器械制造与产业合作，与生物医药的关联有限，仅间接涉及生物制造领域的设备生产环节。

articles.title: Medline recalls angiographic syringes, receives FDA warning letter
articles.summary: The company removed the devices from the market in February following complaints of the syringes disconnecting from manifolds.
articles.chinese_summary: Medline公司因血管造影注射器与歧管断开连接的投诉，于2月主动召回产品并收到FDA警告信。此事涉及医疗器械安全监管，与大健康领域的公共健康及医疗设备管理相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: J&J’s cardiovascular unit stands out again in Q1
articles.summary: Johnson & Johnson’s strategic shift to higher growth medical device markets like cardiovascular is paying off, as the business was the only medtech unit to grow by double digits in the first quarter.
articles.chinese_summary: 强生公司第一季度业绩显示，其向心血管等高增长医疗设备市场的战略转型初见成效，心血管业务是唯一实现两位数增长的医疗科技部门。文章主要关注商业表现，与创新药和生物制造领域关联有限。

articles.title: STAT+: Congress returns to a packed health care agenda
articles.summary: The key health care issues we're watching as Congress returns from recess.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文聚焦美国国会复会后的医疗健康议程，主要涉及医保政策、药品定价等立法议题。虽未直接讨论创新药或生物制造技术，但对医疗政策环境有重要影响，与大健康领域的公共政策层面存在间接关联。

articles.title: TREX2 component PCID2 scaffolds alternative SAC3-based subcomplexes with distinct RNA processing and export function
articles.summary: The TRanscription and EXport 2 (TREX2) complex plays a central role in bridging the transcription and export machinery. Although the subunits of TREX2 work together, they exhibit differences in expression, localization, and dynamics, suggesting distinct cellular roles. To understand the roles of individual TREX2 components, we have characterized their interactomes and identified novel, evolutionarily conserved SAC3(PCI-fold)-based subcomplexes for one of its subunits, PCID2, which acts as a scaf
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了TREX2复合体亚基PCID2通过搭建不同的SAC3亚复合体，在RNA加工和转运中发挥独特功能。虽然该基础研究有助于理解基因表达调控机制，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限，主要属于分子生物学前沿探索。

articles.title: Intellectual Property Puts the IP in 'Hip'
articles.summary: Trivia Tuesday: What made intellectual property such a hot topic in 1996?

articles.title: Jabil & HSE Partner to Transform Diagnostic Instrumentation with Early Design & Manufacturing Integration
articles.summary: Jabil and HSE have formed a strategic collaboration to streamline the design, development, and scalable production of advanced diagnostic and life sciences instrumentation.

articles.title: STAT+: Allogene Therapeutics’ CAR-T treatment eliminates residual cancer cells in B-cell lymphoma patients
articles.summary: The new data bolster Allogene’s efforts to develop a new, easily administered cell therapy that could delay or prevent cancer recurrence.
articles.chinese_summary: Allogene Therapeutics公司CAR-T疗法新数据显示，该疗法能有效清除B细胞淋巴瘤患者的残留癌细胞。这一进展支持了该公司开发新型、易于给药的细胞疗法，以延迟或预防癌症复发的努力。

articles.title: STAT+: Spyre Therapeutics IBD drug shows promise in early trial
articles.summary: The inflammatory bowel disease therapy succeeded in its first major testing, setting up a competition with several large drugmakers.
articles.chinese_summary: Spyre Therapeutics公司针对炎症性肠病(IBD)开发的创新药物在早期临床试验中显示出良好前景，为与多家大型制药公司竞争奠定了基础。该研究属于创新药领域，涉及新型生物制剂开发。

articles.title: STAT+: Revolution Medicines touts ‘unprecedented’ data for pancreatic cancer pill
articles.summary: In a trial, metastatic pancreatic cancer patients on the medicine lived twice as long as those on chemotherapy.
articles.chinese_summary: Revolution Medicines公司公布胰腺癌口服药的突破性数据。试验显示，接受该药物治疗的转移性胰腺癌患者生存期比化疗患者延长一倍，代表了小分子靶向药物领域的重大创新，对精准医疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a pancreatic cancer pill, FDA rejecting a Replimune drug again, and more
articles.summary: Metastatic pancreatic cancer patients who received a targeted pill from Revolution Medicines lived nearly twice as long as patients who got chemotherapy
articles.chinese_summary: Revolution Medicines公司开发的靶向胰腺癌药丸使转移性胰腺癌患者生存期比化疗患者延长近一倍。该口服靶向疗法代表小分子创新药的重要突破，对精准肿瘤治疗领域具有显著意义。

articles.title: Salk to Lead $41.3M ARPA-H Effort to Advance Sonogenetics Therapies
articles.summary:
Backed by ARPA-H, Salk scientists and their collaborators are launching projects aimed at advancing sonogenetics, which uses ultrasound to control cells, toward clinical testing and potential therapeutic applications. 
The post Salk to Lead $41.3M ARPA-H Effort to Advance Sonogenetics Therapies appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 索尔克研究所获ARPA-H资助4130万美元主导声遗传学疗法研究。该项目利用超声波控制细胞活动，推动声遗传学技术进入临床测试阶段，探索其在神经系统疾病等治疗领域的潜在应用价值。

articles.title: How to Safely Navigate the New QSMR & Succeed with FDA Inspections
articles.summary: FDA’s new Quality Management System Regulation (QMSR) places a strong emphasis on risk management, significantly altering how inspections are conducted.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA新质量管理系统法规(QMSR)强化风险管理要求，显著改变检查方式。该内容主要涉及生物制造领域的质量管理体系合规，与药品生产质量监管直接相关，对创新药和大健康领域的质量管理具有间接参考价值。

articles.title: Opinion: STAT+: Landmines await Vinay Prasad’s successor at the FDA
articles.summary: Who would want to be the head of the FDA's Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research?
articles.chinese_summary: 文章讨论FDA生物制品评估与研究中心领导职位面临的挑战，涉及创新生物药（如CAR-T、基因治疗）的监管审批困境。虽然未直接讨论技术细节，但深刻揭示了创新药审评过程中的政治压力和监管复杂性，对理解生物医药创新生态系统具有重要意义。

articles.title: STAT+: GSK advancing ovarian cancer drug mo-rez
articles.summary: Revolution Medicines 'unprecedented' cancer trial data, Allogene's off-the-shelf CAR-T, and other biotech news
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道了GSK推进卵巢癌药物mo-rez的进展，同时涉及Revolution Medicines的突破性癌症试验数据和Allogene的通用型CAR-T疗法。这些内容主要聚焦于创新药物开发，特别是细胞疗法和癌症治疗领域的前沿动态。

articles.title: STAT+: Access granted: CMS greenlights more than 150 participants for chronic care experiment
articles.summary: CMS greenlights more than 150 digital health companies for its ACCESS experiment, a new program for tech-backed chronic care with outcome-aligned payments.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国CMS批准150多家数字健康公司参与ACCESS实验项目，该项目采用技术支持的慢性病护理模式，并与治疗效果挂钩的支付方案，旨在通过创新支付机制改善慢性病管理。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA pushes drugmakers to report missing clinical trial results
articles.summary: FDA officials said an internal analysis found results were not submitted for nearly 30% of studies “highly likely” to fall under mandatory reporting requirements.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA内部分析显示，近30%符合强制报告要求的临床试验未提交结果。FDA正推动药企报告缺失数据，这直接影响临床试验透明度、药品审批流程及公共卫生监管，间接影响创新药开发的可信度。

articles.title: Building the Genome Grid
articles.summary:
MGI Tech’s decade-long push helped turn sequencing into scalable, affordable global infrastructure.
The post Building the Genome Grid appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: MGI Tech通过十年努力将基因测序技术转化为可扩展、经济高效的全球基础设施。该技术平台支撑基因组学研究，对生物制造领域的规模化生产和大健康领域的精准医疗发展具有重要支撑作用。

articles.title: Advancing Fully Walkaway Automation in Genomics Workflows
articles.summary:
EMBL GeneCore plans to expand facility capacity to develop new protocols and further validate and optimize existing workflows for applications such as low-input and metagenomics samples to support the genomics community.
The post Advancing Fully Walkaway Automation in Genomics Workflows appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: EMBL GeneCore计划扩展设施容量，开发新方案并优化现有基因组学工作流程，支持低输入和宏基因组学样本应用。该进展推动基因组学工作流程实现全自动无人操作，提升生物制造效率和标准化水平。

articles.title: Sex-Related Differences in Immune System Aging May Impact Disease Susceptibility
articles.summary:
Researchers have found that immunological aging follows different dynamics between men and women, which are associated with changes in immune cell composition and function between the sexes, and with susceptibility to different diseases.  
The post Sex-Related Differences in Immune System Aging May Impact Disease Susceptibility appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现男女性免疫系统衰老存在差异，表现为免疫细胞组成和功能变化，并与不同疾病易感性相关。这一发现对理解年龄相关疾病性别差异、推动精准医疗和公共健康策略具有重要意义。

articles.title: Extracellular Vesicles From Metabolically Healthy Obesity Convey Distinct Molecular Signals That Initiate Endothelial Dysfunction: A Multi-Omics Study in Adults of African Ancestry
articles.summary: Background: Metabolically healthy obesity (MHO) is unstable, with up to 80% of individuals progressing to metabolically abnormal obesity (MAO), yet mechanisms underlying this transition remain unclear. African Americans bear a disproportionate burden of obesity-related cardiovascular disease. Circulating extracellular vesicles (EVs) mediate inter-organ communication and may drive MAO-related vascular dysfunction. Methods: Adults of African ancestry were classified as metabolically healthy lean (
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨代谢健康型肥胖个体的细胞外囊泡如何通过分子信号引发内皮功能障碍。通过多组学分析发现，这些囊泡可能驱动肥胖向代谢异常转变及血管病变，对理解非洲裔人群心血管疾病机制具有重要意义。

articles.title: Long-lived yeast-derived lipids promote longevity via regional and systemic metabolic remodeling
articles.summary: Aging is marked by a progressive breakdown of intestinal integrity and metabolic homeostasis, which together drive systemic decline in physiology and reduced lifespan. Here, we demonstrate that dietary lipids extracted from a genetically engineered long-lived yeast strain robustly extend lifespan in Drosophila by preserving gut function and modulating the gut brain axis. Using deuterium oxide probed stimulated Raman scattering microscopy, we show that these yeast-derived lipids restore age-relat
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过基因工程改造的长寿酵母提取膳食脂质，在果蝇模型中证明其能通过维持肠道功能和调节肠脑轴来延长寿命。该发现揭示了脂质介导的区域性和系统性代谢重塑在衰老过程中的重要作用，为大健康领域的抗衰老和代谢健康研究提供了新视角。

articles.title: Loss of host factor-mediated m6Am methylation of the viral RNA cap impairs SARS CoV-2 replication
articles.summary: Eukaryotic mRNAs are co-transcriptionally capped at the 5' end with a methylated m7G moiety (cap0), which in higher eukaryotes is further methylated on the ribose (Nm) of the transcription start site (TSS) nucleotide to create the cap1 structure (m7GpppNm). Coronaviruses that replicate in the cytoplasm encode their own capping enzymes to acquire this cap1 structure which facilitates translation and shields them from the host innate immune system. Here we report the identification of an additiona
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现宿主因子介导的m6Am甲基化对SARS-CoV-2病毒RNA帽结构至关重要，其缺失会显著抑制病毒复制。该发现揭示了冠状病毒利用宿主机制进行RNA帽修饰的新途径，为开发针对病毒RNA修饰过程的创新疗法提供了潜在靶点。

articles.title: Stryker to Acquire a Top Private Medtech Company
articles.summary: Stryker has agreed to acquire Amplitude Vascular Systems to add next-generation IVL technology to its peripheral vascular portfolio.
articles.chinese_summary: 史赛克公司宣布收购Amplitude Vascular Systems，将其新一代血管内碎石技术纳入外周血管产品组合。该交易属于医疗器械领域的技术整合，通过收购创新医疗技术扩展产品线，但未涉及创新药物或生物制造等核心生物医药领域。

articles.title: GE HealthCare integrates ultrasound into Medtronic’s Stealth AXiS surgical system
articles.summary: Partnering with GE HealthCare has enabled Medtronic to provide live images to help surgeons assess mid-procedure changes.
articles.chinese_summary: GE医疗与美敦力合作，将超声成像集成至Stealth AXiS手术系统，为外科医生提供实时影像以评估术中变化。该技术提升手术精准度，属于医疗设备整合创新，但未涉及创新药或生物制造领域。

articles.title: STAT+: Hospitals roll out chatbots, looking to reclaim their role in patients’ health conversations
articles.summary: A handful of hospitals are launching their own chatbots, a risky bet aimed at better serving current patients and gaining new ones.
articles.chinese_summary: 多家医院推出自有聊天机器人，旨在改善患者服务并吸引新患者。该举措涉及医疗健康领域的数字化转型，通过AI工具优化医患沟通，虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但属于大健康范畴的医疗服务创新实践。

articles.title: AACR 2026: Professional Awards Acknowledge Community’s Contributions to Cancer Research
articles.summary:
AACR's annual awards recognize scientific contributions in basic, translational, clinical, and epidemiological cancer research. Recipients are laboratory researchers, physician-scientists, and population scientists whose contributions have improved cancer diagnosis, prevention, and treatment.
The post AACR 2026: Professional Awards Acknowledge Community’s Contributions to Cancer Research appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: AACR 2026年度专业奖项表彰在基础、转化、临床及流行病学癌症研究领域的科学贡献。获奖者包括实验室研究人员、医师科学家和群体科学家，他们的工作推动了癌症诊断、预防和治疗方法的进步。

articles.title: Investigating dietary microRNA stability and function using a transgenic milk model with unique microRNA sequences
articles.summary: Milk microRNAs are believed to play gene regulatory functions in the consumer's cells. Milk from different species is enriched in microRNAs predicted to influence immunity, metabolism, and intestinal homeostasis. For milk microRNAs to regulate gene expression in the consumer, they must survive digestion and be present at sufficient levels to influence intestinal cells and potentially beyond-intestinal cells. Milk microRNAs are proposed to be protected from degradation through their association w
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过转基因乳汁模型探讨膳食microRNA的稳定性和功能。研究发现乳汁中的microRNA可能通过抵抗消化降解，调控消费者肠道及全身细胞的基因表达，影响免疫、代谢等生理过程。该研究为大健康领域的营养干预和精准医疗提供了新视角。

articles.title: How I harness research to inform humanitarian relief efforts
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00197-5As a social scientist at Médecins Sans Frontières, Beverley Stringer researches the many non-medical factors that affect health during emergencies.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨了无国界医生组织社会科学家研究紧急情况下影响健康的非医学因素。虽然不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但通过研究社会决定因素为人道主义救援提供依据，与大健康领域的公共卫生和精准医疗理念相关。

articles.title: THE COMPARATIVE STUDY OF THE EFFECT OF LOW-INTENSITY BROADBAND AND LOW-INTENSITY PULSED ULTRASOUND ON THE AMPUTATIONAL MODEL OF WOUND
articles.summary: Abstract Background and aim. Trauma healing with low-intensity ultrasound is effective for different types of injuries affecting both soft tissues and bones. The work aimed to disclose the healing potential of a new type of ultrasound, ultra-wideband low-intensity mechanical waves (UMUS), and to compare its effects with those of low-intensity pulsed ultrasound (LIPUS) in a model of trauma. Material and methods. The work was performed on 2 to 3-month-old male Wistar rats. The tail amputation mode
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究比较了超宽带低强度机械波(UMUS)与低强度脉冲超声(LIPUS)在大鼠断尾创伤模型中的愈合效果。结果显示UMUS在促进创伤愈合方面具有潜力，主要聚焦于物理治疗技术在组织修复中的应用，与医疗器械创新相关，但与创新药和生物制造领域直接关联有限。

articles.title: Heartflow in Patent Dispute with Cleerly
articles.summary: The Mountain View, CA-based company said that Cleerly was infringing on six patents with priority dates from 2012 to 2018.
articles.chinese_summary: Heartflow与Cleerly陷入专利纠纷，涉及6项2012-2018年优先权的专利。该争议聚焦于心血管疾病无创诊断技术，虽涉及医疗技术创新，但与创新药、生物制造等核心领域关联度较低，主要体现医疗健康领域的知识产权保护问题。

articles.title: Benefits of the New Form Factor for IRhythm’s Zio Monitor
articles.summary: iRhythm's Daniel Wilson discusses how a new form factor for the Zio patch is helping to redefine primary care.
articles.chinese_summary: iRhythm公司开发的新型Zio监护仪通过改进外形设计，旨在重新定义初级护理。该设备属于数字健康领域的可穿戴医疗设备，专注于心脏监测，与大健康领域的精准医疗和公共健康相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Stryker to buy Amplitude Vascular Systems
articles.summary: Amplitude’s intravascular lithotripsy technology could emerge as a challenger to Shockwave IVL, Leerink Partners analyst Mike Kratky wrote.
articles.chinese_summary: 史赛克宣布收购Amplitude Vascular Systems，该公司专注于血管内碎石技术。该技术可能挑战Shockwave的现有方案，主要用于治疗血管钙化等疾病。此项收购属于医疗器械领域，与创新药、生物制造或大健康的直接关联较弱。

articles.title: Opinion: Erectile dysfunction is more than a sexual issue
articles.summary: Erectile dysfunction is more than a sexual issue.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文认为勃起功能障碍不仅是性健康问题，更与整体健康密切相关。该疾病可作为心血管疾病和代谢综合征的早期指标，涉及公共健康和老龄化研究领域，但对创新药和生物制造领域相关性较低。

articles.title: On positioning nurses as health experts
articles.summary: Landmines ahead for Vinay Prasad’s successor, hospitals and chatbots, and more health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论护士作为健康专家的角色定位，涉及医疗系统管理和健康新闻。与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联，主要属于大健康范畴，聚焦医疗服务体系和公共卫生话题。

articles.title: STAT+: Trump goes soft on insurance, and a medical underwriting chart
articles.summary: President Trump vowed to take on health insurers, but his policies tell a different story.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文分析特朗普总统在医疗保险政策上的立场矛盾，虽承诺改革保险业但实际政策偏向保险公司。涉及医疗保险监管和医疗核保实践，与大健康领域的公共健康政策相关，但与创新药和生物制造无直接关联。

articles.title: STAT+: Federal judge tosses California No Surprises Act lawsuit against HaloMD
articles.summary: HaloMD is a middleman that became the top filer of out-of-network billing disputes on behalf of medical providers.
articles.chinese_summary: 联邦法官驳回了针对医疗中间商HaloMD的加州《无意外法案》诉讼。HaloMD代表医疗服务提供者处理了大量网络外账单争议，本案核心涉及医疗账单纠纷的法律管辖问题，与医疗政策实施直接相关。

articles.title: Neural Mechanism Underlying Sensory Behavior Revealed in C. elegans
articles.summary:
Animal behavior reflects a complex interplay between an animal’s brain and its sensory surroundings. A new study demonstrates how neurons in nematode worms respond to odors and generate movement to augment understanding of neural circuits.
The post Neural Mechanism Underlying Sensory Behavior Revealed in <i>C. elegans</i> appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过线虫模型揭示嗅觉感知与运动行为的神经机制，深化了对神经环路工作原理的理解。虽然属于基础神经科学研究，但对理解生物感知系统具有重要价值，可能为神经系统疾病研究提供潜在启示。

articles.title: The ‘crazy rule-defying’ genes that determine sex
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01101-xA gripping account reveals the workings of the remarkable chromosomes that specify male or female development.
articles.chinese_summary: 这篇发表于《自然》的文章探讨了决定性别发育的特殊染色体工作机制。虽然涉及基因调控等基础生物学机制，但与创新药研发、生物制造技术及大健康产业的直接关联度较低，主要属于基础科学研究范畴。

articles.title: Viruses allegedly stolen from high-security lab cause stir in Brazil
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01211-6The missing samples — reported to include chikungunya and dengue viruses — have been recovered, but questions linger over motive.
articles.chinese_summary: 巴西高安全实验室的基孔肯雅病毒和登革热病毒样本据称被盗后又被找回，事件引发对实验室生物安全管理和潜在公共卫生风险的关注。虽然不涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但凸显了病原体管控对公共健康的重要性。

articles.title: Human scientists trounce the best AI agents on complex tasks
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01199-zState-of-the-industry report finds that, despite the limitations of artificial-intelligence systems, researchers have embraced them.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》杂志2026年报告显示，人类科学家在复杂任务上仍优于最先进的人工智能系统。尽管AI存在局限性，科研人员已开始接纳这些工具。该研究主要关注AI与人类科研能力的比较，与生物医药领域的直接关联较弱。

articles.title: FDA's Got a Blank Space, Baby, and They'll Write Your Name
articles.summary: This week in Pedersen's POV, our senior editor highlights FDA's use of individual names in warning letters for making unapproved claims about medical devices.

articles.title: The seal strength paradox: Why more is not always better in sterile barrier packaging
articles.summary: What really determines seal performance in sterile packaging?

articles.title: NaP-TRAP: A versatile and accessible workflow to dissect principles of translational regulation and mRNA stability
articles.summary: The translation of mRNA into protein is tightly regulated by both cellular trans-factors and cis-regulatory elements encoded within transcripts. Although transcript fate can be measured by transcript abundance or translation efficiency, separating the contribution of each individual cis-element within a single transcript is an ongoing challenge. Current massively parallel reporter assay (MPRAs) approaches enable systematic interrogation of cis-regulatory elements that control transcript stabilit

articles.title: Huge analysis of 320,000 careers suggests that productive researchers stay that way
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00744-0Early publishing success, team size and international collaborations are some of the best predictors of future publication rates.

articles.title: 14 things our PhD supervisors got right and why it mattered
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 13 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00853-wPhD students reflect on how their supervisors made a meaningful difference — from quiet acts of kindness to career-shaping guidance.

articles.title: Multi-objective Engineering of Trimethylamine Monooxygenase for Improved Thermostability and Cofactor Use
articles.summary: Trimethylamine (TMA) is a major contributor to undesirable odours in protein hydrolysates derived from marine by-products, limiting their industrial use. Flavin-containing monooxygenases (FMOs) catalyse the conversion of TMA to the odourless trimethylamine N-oxide (TMAO); however, industrial applications demand enzymes that are both thermally stable and compatible with cost-effective cofactors. A thermostable variant of the Methylophaga aminisulfidivorans FMO (mFMO_20) can function at elevated t
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过多目标工程改造三甲胺单加氧酶，提升其热稳定性和辅因子利用率。该酶能催化鱼腥味三甲胺转化为无味氧化物，解决了海洋副产品蛋白水解物的异味问题。这项工作为食品工业的生物制造提供了更稳定、成本更低的酶催化剂解决方案。

articles.title: The lncRNA FENDRR fine-tunes FOXF1 protein levels through a negative feedback loop governing human embryonic lung fibroblast-to-myofibroblast transition
articles.summary: Proper lung development requires precise spatial and temporal coordination of epithelial, mesenchymal, and endothelial transcriptional programs that drive branching morphogenesis, alveolarization, and pulmonary vascularization. The forkhead box transcription factor FOXF1 is a central regulator of these processes, acting in mesenchymal-derived cells to control cell identity, fibroblast-to-myofibroblast transition, and vessel development. Both experimental and clinical evidence indicate that pulmo
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示lncRNA FENDRR通过负反馈环路调控FOXF1蛋白水平，影响人胚胎肺成纤维细胞向肌成纤维细胞转化。该机制对理解肺发育过程具有重要意义，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: StockWatch: IPO Market Shows Sign of Life with Avalyn Filing
articles.summary:
The initial public offering (IPO) market showed signs of life for the first time in more than a month as Boston-based Avalyn Pharma filed a registration statement on Wednesday seeking to raise capital to develop its pipeline of respiratory disease treatments.
The post StockWatch: IPO Market Shows Sign of Life with Avalyn Filing appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 波士顿Avalyn制药公司提交IPO申请，拟融资开发呼吸系统疾病治疗管线，标志着IPO市场一个多月来首次复苏。该公司专注于创新疗法开发，但文章未具体说明技术平台。

articles.title: Protenix-v2: Broadening the Reach of Structure Prediction and Biomolecular Design
articles.summary: Advances in biomolecular modeling have broadened the range of problems addressable by structure prediction and design models. Here, we present results from Protenix-v2, a system spanning high-accuracy structure prediction and biomolecular design. On the structure prediction side, Protenix-v2 achieves antibody-antigen success rates with up to 13-point gains over Protenix-v1, while 5-seed performance surpasses previous 1000-seed results. On the design side, Protenix-v2 demonstrates a 100% target-l
articles.chinese_summary: Protenix-v2系统在蛋白质结构预测和生物分子设计领域取得突破，抗体-抗原预测成功率较前代提升13个百分点，设计成功率高达100%。该技术对创新抗体药物开发和靶向治疗设计具有重要价值，直接推动生物医药研发进程。

articles.title: Leveraging quadplexed digital PCR to characterize gene therapy vectors
articles.summary: Currently there is a lack of high-throughput, low material-input methods to screen early-stage product quality of viral and non-viral gene therapy products. Here we propose using multiplex droplet digital PCR (ddPCR) to screen and characterize vector sequences. We describe the adaptation of a Poisson-multinomial model to quantitate integrity of any combination of 4 targets in multiplexed ddPCR. We show the success and limitations of model employment and provide some suggested best practices.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了四重微滴数字PCR技术，用于高通量检测基因治疗载体的序列完整性。通过建立泊松-多项式模型，可同时定量分析4个靶点，为早期基因治疗产品的质量控制提供了低样本量、高效率的解决方案。

articles.title: A Real Time Quaking Induced Conversion (RT-QuIC) Assay for Detection of Misfolded Insulin Protein
articles.summary: Protein misfolding plays a critical role in aging and disease, yet the involvement of specif-ic proteins in metabolic dysfunction is still poorly understood. Here, we report studies on the development of a Real-time Quaking-Induced Conversion (RT-QuIC) assay to detect misfolded insulin, a peptide hormone required for blood glucose regulation. Although RT-QuIC assays were originally designed to amplify misfolded prion proteins implicated in neurodegeneration, we adapted the method to monitor conf
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了实时震动诱导转化(RT-QuIC)检测方法用于监测错误折叠胰岛素。该方法源自神经退行性疾病中朊病毒检测技术，现成功应用于代谢疾病领域，为糖尿病等疾病的早期诊断提供了新型检测工具，在创新诊断技术开发方面具有重要价值。

articles.title: Learning latent conformational landscapes encoded in cryo-EM
articles.summary: Proteins exist as a continuum of conformational states, millions of snapshots of which are captured in every cryo-EM experiment. Current analysis reduces these snapshots to static density maps or discrete classes, discarding the dynamics encoded in the data. Continuous latent-space methods offer a promising alternative, yet whether their learned representations are physically grounded remains unresolved. Here, we show that cryo-EM data can be organized into a probabilistic conformational landsca
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究开发了一种从冷冻电镜数据中学习蛋白质连续构象景观的潜在空间方法。通过保留数据中编码的动态信息，突破了传统静态密度图分析的局限。这项基础技术虽不直接涉及药物开发，但对理解蛋白质功能机制具有重要价值，可能间接支持创新药靶点发现和生物制造过程中的酶工程优化。

articles.title: "Editing the conserved IPA1-TB1 regulatory module reshapes plant architecture and enhances tillering in wheat
articles.summary: Plant architecture is a major determinant of yield potential in cereal crops, where tiller number directly influences spike production and grain yield. The transcriptional regulators Ideal Plant Architecture 1 (IPA1) and Teosinte Branched1 (TB1) constitute a conserved genetic module controlling axillary bud activity and branching in grasses; however, their functional contribution to wheat architecture remains largely unexplored. Here, we employed CRISPR/Cas9-mediated genome editing to investigat
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过CRISPR/Cas9基因组编辑技术，探索IPA1-TB1调控模块在小麦株型构建中的作用。该保守模块控制禾本科植物的分蘖行为，编辑后可重塑小麦株型并增强分蘖能力。研究虽聚焦作物育种，但与基因治疗等技术原理相通，在生物技术应用层面具有一定参考价值。

articles.title: Opinion: Sports betting is creating a twofold public health crisis for some young men
articles.summary: “Even if not everybody is losing a ton of money right now, you're creating this culture of large numbers of gamblers,” Isaac Rose-Berman says on the First Opinion Podcast.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论体育博彩在年轻男性中引发的双重公共卫生危机，涉及赌博文化对心理健康和社会福祉的影响。虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但与公共健康领域的成瘾行为和预防策略相关。

articles.title: Opinion: What STAT readers think about nutrition education in med school
articles.summary: “Is ‘lack of education’ really what we think the problem is in prevention care?” a STAT reader asks.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论医学教育中营养学培训的缺失问题，涉及预防性医疗保健领域。虽然不直接涉及创新药物或生物制造技术，但与公共卫生和精准医疗中的疾病预防理念相关，属于大健康范畴的医疗体系优化议题。

articles.title: In-cell structural insights into fungal ER stress responses
articles.summary: Approximately a third of a cell's proteome is folded in the endoplasmic reticulum (ER). The accumulation of misfolded proteins in the ER results in ER stress. The unfolded protein response (UPR) has evolved to attenuate ER stress by increasing the cell's folding capacity and reducing the folding load in the ER. In metazoans, the latter is notably achieved through mRNA translation inhibition. However, S. cerevisiae lacks the corresponding pathways, and its reliance on translational downregulation
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过细胞内结构分析揭示真菌内质网应激反应机制，重点关注未折叠蛋白反应途径。虽然涉及蛋白质折叠质量控制这一生物制造基础过程，但主要聚焦基础细胞生物学机制，与创新药和健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Targeted sequencing of mutations via RNA-templated gap filling of oligonucleotides for single-cell RNA-seq
articles.summary: We describe a method for targeted sequencing of expressed mutations in single cells. The approach exploits the reverse transcriptase and nick translation activities of the Bst DNA polymerase (Full Length) from Bacillus stearothermophilus (BstFL) to perform an RNA-templated gap filling and ligation between flanking probes. Integrated with probe-based single cell RNAseq workflows, it enables simultaneous whole transcriptomic and multiplexed mutation profiling from the same cell, overcoming key lim

articles.title: Thiol methyltransferase METTL7B coordinates lipid metabolism and promotes tumor progression in pancreatic cancer
articles.summary: Dysregulated lipid metabolism drives cancer progression, yet the molecular mechanisms linking lipid accumulation to pancreatic cancer remain poorly understood. Here, we identify methyltransferase-like 7B (METTL7B) as a key regulator of lipid metabolism and tumor progression in pancreatic cancer. Integrated analysis of large-scale transcriptomic datasets revealed that METTL7B is upregulated in pancreatic cancer compared with normal tissues, and elevated METTL7B expression is associated with poor

articles.title: Cracking the Code for a Successful Partnership with a CDMO
articles.summary: How can you ensure that you’ve selected the right contract design and manufacturing organization? We’re going to tell you how in this webinar sponsored by Velentium.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文聚焦如何选择合适的合同研发生产组织(CDMO)，探讨建立成功合作伙伴关系的关键要素。内容涉及生物制造过程中的外包策略和质量管控，为创新药开发企业提供生物生产环节的专业指导。

articles.title: STAT+: A new trick for old science, and biotech VCs’ scrambled playbook
articles.summary: CAR-T promise in autoimmunity, GSK's goodbye to leucovorin, and more biotech news
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的新应用前景，同时涉及生物科技风投策略调整及制药公司产品线变动。核心聚焦创新疗法临床转化与生物技术投资动态，与创新药领域高度相关。

articles.title: STAT+: Replimune skin cancer drug that became FDA flashpoint is rejected again
articles.summary: A cancer drug candidate that, rightly or wrongly, became a flashpoint at FDA, fails on a second try at approval.
articles.chinese_summary: Replimune公司皮肤癌候选药物在FDA审批中再次被拒，该药物此前已成为监管争议焦点。这一事件凸显了创新肿瘤疗法在监管审批过程中的挑战，对癌症治疗领域的药物开发具有重要参考价值。

articles.title: Drugs from a Text Prompt, Wegovy Pill Competition Dampens Lilly’s Surge
articles.summary:
In this episode of GEN's Touching Base, editors discuss a new wave of agentic AI transforming the modern lab, multiple billion-dollar-plus acquisitions, and the dynamic obesity market.
The post Drugs from a Text Prompt, Wegovy Pill Competition Dampens Lilly’s Surge appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期GEN节目讨论了三项前沿进展：能够根据文本提示生成药物的新型AI系统正在变革实验室研究；多笔超十亿美元的生物医药并购交易；以及诺和诺德口服版Wegovy对礼来肥胖药物市场的竞争影响。内容聚焦AI驱动的药物研发创新和肥胖治疗市场动态。

articles.title: Dual Recognition Drives Site-Directed G-Quadruplex Stabilization: Exploring Oligonucleotide Design in G4 Ligand-Oligonucleotide Conjugates
articles.summary: G-quadruplex (G4) DNA structures are increasingly recognized for their roles in key cellular processes, including transcriptional regulation and genome stability, making them attractive therapeutic targets. Selective recognition of individual G4s remains challenging due to the high structural similarity among human G4 motifs. The G4 Ligand-conjugated Oligonucleotide strategy addresses this need by combining the G4-binding capabilities of small-molecule G4- ligands with the sequence specificity o
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种G4配体-寡核苷酸偶联策略，通过小分子配体与序列特异性寡核苷酸的结合，实现对特定G-四链体结构的定向稳定。该技术为解决G-四链体选择性识别难题提供了新方案，在创新药物开发（特别是靶向转录调控和基因组稳定的疗法）领域具有重要应用价值。

articles.title: Author Correction: Multi-omic profiling reveals age-related immune dynamics in healthy adults
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10484-wAuthor Correction: Multi-omic profiling reveals age-related immune dynamics in healthy adults
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过多组学分析揭示了健康成人体内与年龄相关的免疫动态变化，为理解免疫系统衰老机制提供了重要数据。研究结果对精准医学和公共健康领域具有显著价值，可为年龄相关疾病的预防和诊疗策略提供科学依据。

articles.title: Cancer Drug Shortfalls Tied to How BET Inhibitors Hit BRD2 and BRD4 Differently
articles.summary:
Using rapid protein degradation, chemogenomics, and super‑resolution microscopy in mouse embryonic stem cells, the team dissected the distinct contributions of BRD2 and BRD4 to transcription.
The post Cancer Drug Shortfalls Tied to How BET Inhibitors Hit BRD2 and BRD4 Differently appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究团队通过快速蛋白质降解、化学基因组学及超分辨率显微镜技术，在小鼠胚胎干细胞中揭示了BRD2和BRD4在转录调控中的不同作用。该发现解释了现有BET抑制剂类抗癌药物疗效不足的原因，为开发更精准的靶向药物提供了关键机制依据。

articles.title: The Trends Shaping the Medtech CMO Market
articles.summary: L.E.K. Consultants will discuss the major forces shaping the CMO market in this upcoming webinar hosted by MD+DI and sponsored by Epicor.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨医疗技术合同制造组织(CMO)市场的发展趋势，属于生物制造领域。虽然聚焦医疗器械而非创新药，但涉及合同制造、生产流程优化等生物制造核心环节，与CDMO模式高度相关。

articles.title: Opinion: What public health can learn from the MAHA movement
articles.summary: “What MAHA has built, in a relatively short time, is social capital,” writes Monica L. Wang.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨公共卫生领域可从MAHA运动学习的经验，强调社会资本在促进社区健康中的重要作用。文章虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对大健康领域的公共卫生策略和社区健康干预具有参考价值。

articles.title: Cryo-EM Structural Biology Facility Opened in San Diego by FairJourney Bio
articles.summary:
The cryo-EM technology is designed to provide detailed insights across the R&D value chain—from epitope mapping and hit generation to structure-guided lead optimization and candidate selection.
The post Cryo-EM Structural Biology Facility Opened in San Diego by FairJourney Bio appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: FairJourney Bio在圣地亚哥开设冷冻电镜结构生物学设施，该技术可为研发价值链提供从表位定位、先导化合物发现到结构引导的候选药物优化的全程支持。这一平台将显著提升生物制药研发效率，对生物制造工艺开发具有重要价值。

articles.title: First Detailed Insight into Bornavirus Nucleoprotein–RNA Complex Reveals Unique Assembly
articles.summary:
Cryo-EM study reveals the first detailed structure of the Bornavirus nucleoprotein–RNA complex, uncovering unique RNA binding and assembly mechanisms that advance understanding of viral replication and antiviral targets.
The post First Detailed Insight into Bornavirus Nucleoprotein–RNA Complex Reveals Unique Assembly appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 冷冻电镜研究首次揭示了博尔纳病毒核蛋白-RNA复合物的精细结构，发现了独特的RNA结合和组装机制。这一发现推进了对病毒复制机制的理解，为开发抗病毒药物提供了新的潜在靶点，对创新药物研发具有重要价值。

articles.title: Epigenetics at Birth Links Microbiome to Neurodevelopment, Potentially ASD and ADHD
articles.summary:
Researchers have found that the human gut microbiome and epigenetics are intertwined, and that both contribute to early life neurodevelopment, and potentially to the development of ASD and ADHD. 
The post Epigenetics at Birth Links Microbiome to Neurodevelopment, Potentially ASD and ADHD appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现人类肠道微生物组与表观遗传学在出生时即相互关联，共同影响早期神经发育，并可能与自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)和注意力缺陷多动障碍(ADHD)的发生有关。这项研究为大健康领域的精准医疗和公共健康提供了新见解。

articles.title: 2026 Medical Device Manufacturing Outlook: Optimism Grows Despite Lingering Uncertainty
articles.summary: The Q1 2026 Manufacturing Pulse Study reveals optimism in manufacturing, led by medical and aerospace growth, despite ongoing challenges like inflation, labor shortages, and supply chain risks.
articles.chinese_summary: 2026年第一季度制造业脉搏研究显示，医疗设备和航空航天领域引领制造业乐观情绪增长。尽管面临通胀、劳动力短缺和供应链风险等持续挑战，但医疗制造领域仍表现出较强韧性。

articles.title: RPL38 controls 60S ribosomal subunit homeostasis to regulate start-codon stringency and frame selection during C9ORF72 RAN translation
articles.summary: Translation initiation depends on stringent start-codon recognition, yet how ribosomal states modulate initiation stringency remains incompletely defined. Repeat-associated non-AUG (RAN) translation is a non-canonical initiation pathway that generates toxic dipeptide repeat proteins in C9ORF72-associated frontotemporal dementia and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (FTD/ALS). Here, we performed a dual-luciferase reporter-based siRNA screen to identify factors that differentially regulate canonical A
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过siRNA筛选发现核糖体蛋白RPL38通过调控60S核糖体亚基稳态，影响C9ORF72基因中重复序列的非AUG翻译过程。该机制揭示了核糖体状态如何调节翻译起始严格性，为FTD/ALS等神经退行性疾病中毒性蛋白产生提供了新见解，但对创新药、生物制造或大健康的直接应用有限。

articles.title: Retractable Technologies Cuts Jobs to Save $2.2M & Focus on Domestic Production
articles.summary: Retractable Technologies is cutting 16% of its workforce to save $2.2 million annually, strengthen domestic production, and reduce reliance on Chinese imports.
articles.chinese_summary: Retractable Technologies裁员16%以节省220万美元年度开支，重点加强国内生产并减少对中国进口的依赖。该举措主要涉及医疗器械生产优化，与生物制造领域的供应链本土化相关，但与创新药研发和大健康领域直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Pulse Biosciences hires Liane Teplitsky as COO
articles.summary: The appointment gives a former Abbott leader oversight of efforts to bring a pulsed field ablation device to market.
articles.chinese_summary: Pulse Biosciences任命前雅培高管Liane Teplitsky为首席运营官，负责推动脉冲场消融设备上市。该设备用于治疗心律失常，属于医疗器械领域，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低，但属于大健康范畴的医疗技术应用。

articles.title: Stryker is fully operational after cyberattack
articles.summary: The company disclosed that it expects a material impact on first-quarter financial results. However, it does not expect an effect on full-year results.
articles.chinese_summary: 史赛克公司宣布在遭受网络攻击后已全面恢复运营，预计将对第一季度财务产生实质性影响，但不影响全年业绩。作为医疗器械制造商，该事件间接关联生物制造领域的安全运营问题。

articles.title: Opinion: I’m a MAHA activist. I went into the public health lion’s den — and it changed how I think
articles.summary: “In my most honest of moments, what I want from the medical community is the chance to trust it again,” a MAHA advocate writes.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨MAHA活动家与公共卫生系统的互动经历，聚焦医患信任重建议题。虽涉及公共卫生领域，但未直接讨论创新药研发、生物制造技术或精准医疗等具体科技内容，主要关注医疗体系的社会人文层面。

articles.title: STAT+: GSK says goodbye to leucovorin (again)
articles.summary: A revised ACIP charter, sports betting and gambling addiction, and other health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: GSK再次停止生产甲酰四氢叶酸(leucovorin)，同时涉及修订ACIP章程、体育博彩与赌博成瘾等公共卫生话题。文章主要关注药品市场动态和公共卫生政策，与创新药研发和生物制造直接关联度较低，属于大健康领域的医药市场与公共卫生范畴。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about cheap generic obesity drugs in India, high demand for estrogen patches and more
articles.summary: And more pharmaceutical news from the Pharmalot campus via the Pharmalittle newsletter
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道印度廉价仿制肥胖药物、雌激素贴片需求激增等医药行业动态。内容涉及公共卫生领域的药物可及性问题，但与创新药研发、生物制造技术关联较弱，主要反映大健康市场的需求变化和药品供应情况。

articles.title: Trump administration admits a glaring error in its accusations about New York health care fraud
articles.summary: The Trump administration this week acknowledged it made a significant error in figures it used to help justify a fraud probe into New York’s Medicaid program
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普政府承认在指控纽约医疗欺诈案件中使用错误数据。此事涉及医疗补助计划(Medicaid)调查，主要反映政府监管与公共卫生政策执行问题，与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联。

articles.title: Neuron-specific epigenetic repression of Cdk5 impairs hippocampal-dependent memory in male and female mice
articles.summary: Biological sex regulates fundamental neurobiology, as well as the etiology and prevalence of neuropsychiatric disorders. Cyclin-dependent kinase 5 (Cdk5) is a neuronally enriched kinase that regulates synaptic plasticity, neuronal homeostasis, and hippocampal-dependent memory. While Cdk5 protein activity is necessary and sufficient to promote memory in male rodents, its role in females and its gene regulation in either sex remain poorly understood. In males, Cdk5 protein inhibition impairs fear
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过神经元特异性表观遗传抑制Cdk5，揭示了该激酶在雄性和雌性小鼠海马依赖性记忆中的关键作用。研究发现Cdk5蛋白活性在雄性啮齿类动物中足以促进记忆形成，但其在雌性中的作用及基因调控机制尚不明确，为理解性别差异在神经精神疾病中的生物学基础提供了新见解。

articles.title: Impact of Fluorophore and Epitope Position on Destabilized Reporter Performance in C. elegans
articles.summary: Determining spatial and temporal gene expression is crucial for understanding animal development and physiology. Promoter reporters are powerful tools used to dissect how cis-regulatory elements and trans-acting factors control gene expression. Many fluorescent proteins used in promoter reporters, however, have long half-lives (>24 hr) which limit the study of dynamic expression. Destabilizing sequences like PEST reduce the half-life of reporter proteins to provide a more representative readout
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过PEST不稳定序列优化荧光报告蛋白的半衰期，提升对线虫基因表达动态监测的准确性。虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但为发育生物学研究提供了改进工具，间接支持精准医学的基础研究。

articles.title: How sports betting apps hook users
articles.summary: In this week's STATus Report, host Alex Hogan dives into how sports betting apps hook users — and how he himself fell for some too-good-to-be-true promotions.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨体育博彩应用程序如何通过营销策略吸引用户成瘾，涉及行为成瘾和数字健康问题，虽不直接关联医药技术，但对公共健康领域的成瘾行为研究具有间接参考价值。

articles.title: Genetic Variability and Population Structure within the Anopheles tessellatus complex (Theobald, 1901) in Indonesia using ITS2 nuclear and COI, COII mitochondrial sequences
articles.summary: Some Anopheles species that act as malaria vectors are members of species complexes, a concept whereby sibling species cannot be differentiated solely on the basis of morphological characters. Therefore, species complexes represent a major problem in malaria vector control, because within an Anopheles complex, vectors cannot be differentiated from non-vector species, unless molecular techniques are used to identify them. The Anopheles tessellatus species complex is an important potential vector
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过分子标记分析印尼按蚊复合体的遗传多样性与种群结构，旨在解决疟疾媒介识别难题。虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对精准公共卫生中的疾病防控策略具有基础支撑意义。

articles.title: The middle years of my life and career: balancing two experiments at once
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00195-7When I found out that I was no longer eligible for an early-career grant, I took a moment to pause and reflect on my family life and my work.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文是一位科研人员对职业生涯中期的反思，主要讨论早期职业基金资格失效后如何平衡家庭生活与科研工作。内容聚焦个人学术生涯发展，未涉及创新药、生物制造或大健康领域的具体技术或产业议题。

articles.title: Homelessness of the heart
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01063-0The past is a foreign country.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨心灵漂泊与过去异化等哲学主题，标题'心灵无家可归'暗示精神层面的流离失所。文章未涉及生物医药技术、药物研发或健康管理等内容，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无专业关联性。

articles.title: Behind the scenes with Artemis II’s scientists during the historic Moon fly-by
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01208-1Nature correspondent Alexandra Witze tells us about being in NASA’s scientific nerve centre.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文记录了《自然》杂志记者在NASA科学控制中心的见闻，聚焦阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的历史性月球飞越。内容主要涉及航天任务执行过程及科学观测活动，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康主题无直接关联。

articles.title: How the butterfly got its name: Books in brief
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01160-0Andrew Robinson reviews five of the best science picks.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志刊登的书评文章，由Andrew Robinson点评五本最佳科普读物。内容聚焦于科学书籍介绍，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接专业关联，属于科普传播范畴。

articles.title: GAO report shows gap between scale of illegal vapes and enforcement
articles.summary: The Justice Department's actions on illegal vapes pales next to the scale of the problem, anti-smoking advocates say.

articles.title: Transcriptional and spatial profiling of fibroblasts from human lungs highlights CTHRC1+ cells as fibrogenic signaling hubs in fibrosis
articles.summary: Lung fibroblasts are key regulators of tissue homeostasis and extracellular matrix (ECM) remodeling, and their aberrant activation drives the progressive parenchymal scarring characteristic of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a fatal disease with limited therapeutic options. Despite their central pathogenic role, lung fibroblasts are difficult to isolate due to their embedded position within the ECM, and standard in vitro culture conditions may lead to the loss of their native functional and

articles.title: Daily briefing: A treatment to reverse cellular ageing is about to be tested in people
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01207-2‘Partial reprogramming’, which winds back a cell’s biological clock, could enter clinical trials later this year. Plus, a single DNA tweak can make female mice grow testes and why obesity drugs are more effective in some people than others.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道了一种逆转细胞衰老的'部分重编程'技术即将进入临床试验，可能成为创新抗衰老疗法。同时探讨了肥胖药物疗效个体差异及基因调控对性发育的影响，这些发现对精准医疗和老龄化健康管理具有重要意义。

articles.title: MuteFree: A novel AAV vector system featuring mutation-free ITRs
articles.summary: Instability of the inverted terminal repeats (ITRs) in AAV transfer plasmids has long hindered consistent and efficient production of therapeutic AAV vectors. The palindromic, GC-rich ITR sequence readily forms secondary structures, making them highly mutable in transfer plasmids. Indeed, a recent survey observed mutated ITRs in ~40% of AAV transfer plasmids from labs around the world. Conventional strategies to mitigate this issue -- such as using specialized E. coli strains, suboptimal culture
articles.chinese_summary: MuteFree开发的新型AAV载体系统解决了转移质粒中反向末端重复序列(ITR)不稳定的长期难题。该技术通过消除ITR突变，显著提高治疗性AAV载体的生产效率和一致性，对基因治疗产品的生物制造工艺具有重要改进意义。

articles.title: STAT+: 5 years after lupus breakthrough, CAR-T is still surprising autoimmunity researchers
articles.summary: CAR-T therapy is toting up more remissions in autoimmune disease, and generating a flood of experimentation and investment.
articles.chinese_summary: CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域取得突破性进展，系统性红斑狼疮治疗后五年持续呈现缓解效果。该疗法引发大量实验研究与投资热潮，为自身免疫疾病治疗开辟全新方向，持续超出研究人员预期。

articles.title: One woman, three autoimmune diseases: CAR-T therapy vanquishes ultra-rare disease trio
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01108-4Fourteen months after treatment with engineered immune cells, the recipient has no symptoms and doesn’t need to take medication.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》杂志报道一名患有三种自身免疫疾病的女性在接受CAR-T细胞治疗后，14个月内症状完全消失且无需服药。该案例展示了CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的突破性应用，为传统疗法无效的患者提供了新的治疗希望。

articles.title: RAStoERK: a reference interaction atlas for insights into signaling and disease
articles.summary: The RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway has been extensively studied for its roles in physiology and disease, yet a systems level view of its interplay with the broader cellular context is lacking, limiting insight into paralog specific roles, mutation driven rewiring, and cross pathway integration. To address this, we simultaneously mapped the interactomes of all pathway components and their activating and inactivating mutations, identifying 2,500 high confidence interactors, 88% of which previously unrepo
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究构建了RAS/ERK信号通路的全面相互作用图谱，揭示了2500个高置信度相互作用因子。该图谱为理解信号转导机制、突变导致的网络重构及疾病发生提供了系统视角，对癌症靶向治疗和精准医疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: Expert Reveals the Major Catalyst Behind Medtech M&A in 2026
articles.summary: CDMO platforms are driving Medtech M&A in 2026 as buyers seek specialized capabilities like precision diagnostics and regenerative biomaterials, emphasizing complexity and strategic partnerships.
articles.chinese_summary: 专家指出2026年医疗器械并购的主要推动力是CDMO平台，收购方寻求精准诊断和再生生物材料等专业能力，强调技术复杂性和战略合作在行业整合中的重要性。

articles.title: Medline Hit with FDA Warning Over CAPA Failures, Cleanroom Violations, & Design Testing Deficiencies
articles.summary: Medline Industries faces FDA scrutiny for significant quality system violations.
articles.chinese_summary: Medline Industries因质量体系违规受到FDA警告，涉及纠正措施失效、洁净室违规及设计测试缺陷。这直接关联生物制造领域的GMP合规、生产质量控制和CDMO监管要求，突显生物医药生产质量管理的重要性。

articles.title: CDRH targets hospital readmissions with home device innovation challenge
articles.summary: The center plans to pick nine devices to help support patients and caregivers after a hospital stay.
articles.chinese_summary: CDRH推出家庭医疗设备创新挑战赛，旨在选取九种设备支持患者出院后恢复及护理，通过减少再入院率改善医疗系统效率，属于大健康领域的医疗创新应用。

articles.title: STAT+: A new health care blueprint from a key Democratic think tank
articles.summary: Democrats are focused on health care affordability as costs keep climbing.
articles.chinese_summary: 民主党智库发布医疗改革蓝图，重点关注医疗成本持续上涨背景下的可负担性问题。文章涉及医疗政策制定和公共健康管理，与大健康领域直接相关，但未涉及创新药或生物制造技术。

articles.title: Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration
articles.summary:
The new portal was designed to extend internal workflows to support external collaborators. With this structured approach, labs experience increased efficiency while minimizing version conflicts, human error, and compliance risks.
The post Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Labguru推出面向CRO/CDMO与客户协作的门户平台，通过结构化工作流程提升实验室效率，减少版本冲突、人为错误和合规风险，主要服务于生物制造领域的合作管理。

articles.title: Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study
articles.summary:
Under the terms of the partnership, Seer's Proteograph product suite will be used to profile the plasma proteome in samples from 10,000 participants from the PRECISE-SG100k initiative.
The post Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Seer公司将利用深度蛋白质组学技术分析新加坡PRECISE-SG100k项目中1万名参与者的血浆蛋白质组。该研究通过大规模人群队列的蛋白质组分析，有助于发现疾病生物标志物，推动精准医疗和公共卫生发展。

articles.title: LINC00205	 acts as a multivalent scaffold promoting FUSP525L recruitment in Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis stress granules
articles.summary: Stress granules (SG) are dynamic, membrane-less ribonucleoprotein assemblies that orchestrate cellular stress responses and rapidly disassemble upon stress relief. In Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), mutations in RNA-binding proteins such as Fused in Sarcoma (FUS) impair SG dynamics, promoting the formation of aberrant and persistent granules.
