Spatiotemporal Profiling of Intratumoral Free Payload Distribution via MALDI Imaging Mass Spectrometry: Implications for Drug-to-Antibody Ratio Optimization in Antibody-Drug Conjugates.
Dialling up the circadian clock to target ageing.
Integrative metabolomics and machine learning reveal the toxic mechanisms of elaidic acid in polycystic ovary syndrome.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究整合代谢组学和机器学习技术，探究反式油酸在多囊卵巢综合征中的毒性机制。创新在于多学科方法融合，关键发现揭示其通过干扰代谢通路导致疾病进展，为理解PCOS病理机制提供新见解。

articles.title: Status and influencing factors of home-based fluid management in patients with chronic heart failure.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章调查慢性心力衰竭患者家庭液体管理的现状，并分析其影响因素。创新在于聚焦家庭护理环境，关键发现可能识别管理障碍与促进因素，为改善患者自我管理和制定个性化干预策略提供参考。

articles.title: Combined Burst Mode versus Torsional Mode Phacoemulsification for Patients with Hard Nuclear Cataracts: A Prospective Comparative Cohort Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究为前瞻性队列研究，比较联合爆发模式与扭转模式超声乳化术治疗硬核白内障的临床效果。创新在于直接对比两种手术技术，关键发现可能涉及手术效率、安全性及患者预后的差异，为优化白内障手术方案提供依据。

articles.title: Factors influencing corneal edema after phacoemulsification combined with intraocular lens implantation in elderly diabetic cataract patients and establishment of a predictive model.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究老年糖尿病白内障患者超声乳化联合人工晶体植入术后角膜水肿的影响因素。创新点在于建立了预测模型，识别关键风险因素，为临床预防提供量化工具。

articles.title: Letter to the editor: "Chatbots for breast cancer education: a systematic review and meta-analysis".
articles.chinese_summary: 这封致编辑的信针对乳腺癌教育聊天机器人系统评价提出方法学评论。关键发现是指出原研究在文献检索和偏倚评估方面的局限性，强调需要更严谨的证据评估。
articles.journal: Supportive care in cancer : official journal of the Multinational Association of Supportive Care in Cancer

articles.title: Advancing the Understanding of Temporal Dynamics in Rehabilitation Adherence: Methodological Reflections on the Study by Shao et al [Letter].
articles.chinese_summary: 本文是对邵等人研究的评论信，重点探讨康复依从性时间动态研究的分析方法。创新在于反思现有研究设计局限，提出改进时间序列数据分析方法的建议。

articles.title: Comparison of 2.2 mm vs. 2.6 mm corneal incisions in phacoemulsification in hard nuclear cataracts: impact on intraoperative energy and postoperative corneal recovery.
articles.chinese_summary: 比较2.2mm与2.6mm角膜切口在硬核白内障超声乳化术中的效果。发现较小切口可显著降低术中超声能量使用，并促进术后角膜恢复更快，为手术切口选择提供新依据。

articles.title: Tailored personas for anticipatory grief management among primary family caregivers of patients with advanced lung cancer in China: a qualitative study.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过质性访谈，探讨了为中国晚期肺癌患者主要家庭照护者定制个性化支持方案的必要性。创新点在于提出基于不同照护者特征的定制化干预策略，以更有效地管理预期性哀伤。

articles.title: Management of Gastrointestinal Function in Patients After Laparoscopic Surgery for Benign Gynaecological Diseases: A Best Practice Implementation Project.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过循证实践项目优化妇科良性疾病腹腔镜术后患者胃肠功能管理方案，实施标准化护理措施，有效促进术后胃肠功能恢复并改善临床结局。

articles.title: Health risk assessment of perfluorinated compounds in the drinking water of a watershed located in northwest China in 2024: a cross-sectional study.
articles.chinese_summary: 采用横断面研究方法评估2024年中国西北某流域饮用水全氟化合物健康风险，发现关键污染物超标情况，为区域饮用水安全管理和风险防控提供科学依据。

articles.title: Molecular engineering of ionic organic phototheranostic agents for NIR-II imaging-guided synergistic phototherapy.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过分子工程设计新型离子型有机光诊疗剂，实现了高效近红外二区成像引导的光热-光动力协同治疗，为精准肿瘤治疗开发了多功能一体化试剂平台。

articles.title: The tumor microenvironment in leukemia: molecular pathways of immune evasion.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章系统阐述了白血病微环境中肿瘤细胞通过特定分子通路逃避免疫监视的机制，揭示了免疫检查点、代谢重编程等关键途径，为白血病免疫治疗提供新靶点。

articles.title: Stabilizing Ni(3+)-Rich NiO(x)/Perovskite Interface via Dual Coordination for Efficient and Durable Perovskite Photovoltaics.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过双配位策略稳定Ni(3+)富集的NiO(x)/钙钛矿界面，显著提升了钙钛矿光伏器件的效率和长期稳定性，为高效耐久太阳能电池开发提供了新界面工程方案。

articles.title: The extracellular matrix in inflammation and cancer.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了细胞外基质在炎症与癌症中的多重功能。重点阐述了ECM通过调控免疫细胞功能和信号通路，在疾病发生发展中扮演的关键角色，为理解相关病理过程提供了新视角。

articles.title: Water-Cluster-Mediated Amorphous-to-Crystalline Transition Enables Scalable Fabrication of Stable Surfactant-Free MOF Nanocatalyst.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现水簇介导的无定形向晶体转变，实现了无表面活性剂MOF纳米催化剂的可控制备。该催化剂具有优异的稳定性和催化活性，为绿色、可扩展合成高性能纳米材料开辟了新途径。

articles.title: Structure-Guided Design and Rapid Cell-Free Screening of a Superior Restriction Endonuclease DpnI Mutant to Enhance the Specific Activity and Efficiency of Site-Directed Mutagenesis.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究采用结构引导设计结合无细胞快速筛选，成功开发了DpnI限制性内切酶的高活性突变体。该突变体显著提高了定点诱变的特异性和效率，为分子生物学工具酶的优化提供了高效方法。

articles.title: Compositional Engineering to Tailor Pseudographitic Microstructure of Hard Carbon for Enhanced Sodium Storage.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过组分工程调控硬碳的伪石墨微观结构，显著提升了其储钠性能。关键发现是优化后的材料具有更高的可逆容量和优异的倍率性能，为高性能钠离子电池负极材料的设计提供了新思路。

articles.title: Targeting the oxidative stress-neuroinflammation axis: the mechanism of arctigenin's broad-spectrum analgesia with limited side effects.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了牛蒡子苷元通过靶向氧化应激-神经炎症轴发挥广谱镇痛作用的机制。其创新点在于既能有效缓解多种疼痛，又避免了传统镇痛药的常见副作用，为开发新型镇痛药物提供了新策略。

articles.title: Washed Microbiota Transplantation as a Rescue Therapy for Refractory Unidentified Pathogen Intestinal Infections: Findings From a National Multi-Centre, Real-World Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 一项全国多中心真实世界研究表明，洗涤菌群移植可作为难治性未明病原体肠道感染的挽救疗法。该研究证实了其安全性与有效性，为临床难题提供了新解决方案。

articles.title: Corrigendum to "Using a new type of visible light-based emission fluorescence microscope to identify the benign and malignant nature of thyroid tissue during the surgical process: Analysis of diagnostic results" [Photodiagnosis and Photodynamic Therapy 57 (2026) 105324].
articles.chinese_summary: 该更正声明针对一篇关于新型可见光荧光显微镜的研究。原研究旨在术中区分甲状腺组织良恶性，此勘误不影响其展示的技术在术中快速诊断方面的潜力。

articles.title: Smartphone-assisted dual-mode fluorescent/ colorimetric biosensors based on Fe(3)O(4)-CDs nanozyme for self-calibrated detection of oxytetracycline.
articles.chinese_summary: 开发了一种基于Fe3O4-CDs纳米酶的双模式荧光/比色生物传感器，结合智能手机辅助，实现了土霉素的自校准检测。该方法具有高灵敏度和便携性，适用于快速现场分析。

articles.title: Resibufogenin protects against atherosclerosis in ApoE(-/-) mice through blocking NLRP3 inflammasome assembly.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现华蟾毒精能通过阻断NLRP3炎症小体组装，有效抑制ApoE(-/-)小鼠的动脉粥样硬化进程。这一发现揭示了其抗动脉硬化的新机制，为治疗提供了潜在新靶点。

articles.title: Process optimization of ultrasound-assisted solvent extraction of Moringa seed oil and investigation of its physicochemical properties, bioactivity and rheology.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究优化了超声波辅助溶剂提取辣木籽油的工艺，并系统评估了其理化特性、生物活性及流变学性质。该方法显著提高了提取效率，为辣木籽油的开发应用提供了科学依据。

articles.title: Association between daily sitting time and osteoarthritis based on the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) 2007 to 2018: A cross-sectional study.
articles.chinese_summary: 基于NHANES数据的横断面研究发现，每日久坐时间与骨关节炎患病风险呈正相关。这为通过减少久坐来预防骨关节炎提供了流行病学证据。

articles.title: N,N'-Di-Boc-N″-fluorosulfonyl-guanidine: A SuFEx-Enabled Guanylating Reagent (SuFEx-G) with Enhanced Reactivity on Water.
articles.chinese_summary: 报道了一种新型SuFEx氟磺酰胍试剂（SuFEx-G），其创新点在于增强的水相反应活性。该试剂为胍基化反应提供了高效新工具，拓展了点击化学应用。

articles.title: Machine learning-based prognostic analysis of patients with status epilepticus in the neurological intensive care unit.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究开发了基于机器学习的癫痫持续状态患者预后预测模型。该模型利用神经重症监护室数据，能准确识别高风险患者，为临床干预提供决策支持。

articles.title: The efficacy and safety of rituximab pre-treatment in allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation in pediatric patients with severe aplastic anemia.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了利妥昔单抗预处理在儿童重型再生障碍性贫血异基因造血干细胞移植中的疗效与安全性。结果显示该方案可提高移植成功率且安全性良好。

articles.title: EchoAtlas: A Conversational, Multi-View Vision-Language Foundation Model for Echocardiography Interpretation and Clinical Reasoning.
articles.chinese_summary: EchoAtlas是一种用于超声心动图分析的多视角视觉语言基础模型。其创新在于支持对话式交互，能够进行临床推理，辅助医生完成图像解读和诊断决策。
articles.journal: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences

articles.title: An antiageing telomere-protective effect of superoxide dismutase-rich Tetraselmis chui in human cells.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现富含超氧化物歧化酶的Tetraselmis chui藻类提取物具有保护端粒、延缓细胞衰老的作用。该天然产物为开发抗衰老制剂提供了新方向。

articles.title: Adults with Intellectual Disability and Consent to Precision Medicine Research: Using Supported Decision-Making to Facilitate First-Person Consent.
articles.chinese_summary: 针对智力障碍成年人的精准医学研究，提出采用支持性决策模式促进本人知情同意。该方法在保障研究伦理的同时，尊重了参与者的自主决策权。
articles.journal: The Journal of law, medicine & ethics : a journal of the American Society of Law, Medicine & Ethics

articles.title: The double-edged sword effect of digital leadership on employee-AI collaboration: A study based on nurses.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现数字领导力对护士与AI协作具有双刃剑效应：既能促进技术应用，又可能增加工作压力。研究揭示了数字化管理在医疗场景中的复杂影响机制。

articles.title: Systemic Cytokine Alterations in Periodontitis Independent of Comorbidities: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
articles.chinese_summary: 系统综述和荟萃分析表明，牙周炎患者存在系统性细胞因子改变，且这种改变独立于其他合并症。研究明确了牙周炎特有的炎症特征，为理解其全身影响提供了新证据。

articles.title: Evaluation of a Clinic-Level Intervention to Increase Anxiety and Depression Screening in an Urban HIV Clinic.
articles.chinese_summary: 评估城市HIV诊所推行诊室级干预对焦虑抑郁筛查率的影响。通过系统化筛查流程和医护人员培训，显著提高了精神健康筛查率，凸显整合心理关怀在HIV治疗中的重要性。

articles.title: Enhancing Parkinson's Disease Staging: An Integrative Deep Learning Framework for Multimodal Feature Selection.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出整合式深度学习框架，通过多模态特征选择提升帕金森病分期精度。该模型能自动筛选临床、影像和生物标记关键特征，显著优于传统方法，助力精准分期诊断。

articles.title: Susceptibility of Assessment Types to AI-Generated Content in Digital Health and Health Information Management Education: Quasi-Experimental Pilot Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 准实验研究评估数字健康教育中各类考核对AI生成内容的敏感性。结果显示开放式问答题抗AI干扰能力最强，为教育机构设计防AI作弊的评估体系提供了实证依据。

articles.title: Impact of Different Onboarding Strategies on Low Adoption and Engagement With a Self-Monitoring and Management App for Chronic Musculoskeletal Pain: Prospective Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 前瞻性研究比较不同引导策略对慢性肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理APP使用率的影响。发现个性化引导和持续支持能显著改善用户采纳度和参与度，为数字健康干预的有效实施提供了关键策略依据。

articles.title: Conformationally Regulated CRISPR/Cas12a Activation Enabled by a Programmable DNA Dumbbell for Electrochemical SNP Genotyping.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种可编程DNA哑铃结构调控CRISPR/Cas12a构象激活的新方法，用于电化学单核苷酸多态性（SNP）分型。该策略通过构象开关精确控制Cas12a活性，显著提高了检测特异性和灵敏度，为精准基因分型提供了创新工具。

articles.title: Redefining Vascular Monitoring: A Wearable with Force Sensor Resistors for Real-Time Pulse Wave Velocity Assessment.
articles.chinese_summary: 研发基于力敏电阻的可穿戴设备，实现实时脉搏波传导速度监测。该技术突破传统血管功能评估限制，提供连续、便捷的动脉僵硬度监测方案，重塑血管健康管理模式。

articles.title: TriCloud: Drug-Target-Disease Ternary Network for Drug Repositioning Research Based on Point Cloud Modeling.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出TriCloud创新框架，基于点云建模构建药物-靶点-疾病三元网络。该方法突破传统二元网络局限，显著提升药物重定位预测精度，为加速老药新用提供新范式。
articles.journal: IEEE transactions on computational biology and bioinformatics

articles.title: Exploring the Needs of Health Professionals for a Type 2 Diabetes Remote Patient Monitoring Dashboard for Personalized Care: Focus Group Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过焦点小组研究探索医疗专业人员对2型糖尿病远程监测仪表板的需求。核心发现包括对个性化数据可视化、风险预警及诊疗决策支持功能的迫切需求，为开发临床实用工具奠定基础。

articles.title: The Digital Information Environment of Lung Cancer and Lung Cancer Screening: Protocol for a Cross-Platform Social Media Content Analysis.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章提出跨平台社交媒体内容分析方案，系统研究肺癌及筛查相关的数字信息环境。创新性地整合多平台数据，旨在揭示信息传播模式及潜在认知偏差，为公共卫生沟通策略提供支持。

articles.title: Factors Associated With the Use of Digital Health and Well-Being Resources in Non-Memory-Led Dementias: Quantitative Survey Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过定量调查，分析了非记忆主导型痴呆患者使用数字健康资源的影响因素。发现关键因素包括患者认知功能、照护者支持及技术可及性，为优化此类人群的数字健康干预提供了实证依据。

articles.title: The Mediating Role of Artificial Intelligence Anxiety in The Effect of Nurses' Attitudes Toward Health Technologies on Their Readiness for Medical Artificial Intelligence.
articles.chinese_summary: 揭示AI焦虑在护士技术态度与AI准备度间的中介作用。发现缓解AI焦虑能显著提升护理人员对医疗AI的接受程度，为培训干预提供关键靶点。
articles.journal: Journal of evaluation in clinical practice

articles.title: The Coordination on Mobile Pandemic Apps Best Practice and Solution Sharing (COMPASS) Framework: Holistic Approach to Pandemic mHealth Apps.
articles.chinese_summary: 推出COMPASS综合框架，系统整合大流行移动健康应用的最佳实践。涵盖开发部署全周期，强调数据互操作性、隐私保护及跨国经验共享机制。

articles.title: Reimagining Nursing Theories in the Age of Artificial Intelligence: Preserving the Human Essence Amid Digital Transformation.
articles.chinese_summary: 探讨人工智能时代护理理论的革新路径。提出在数字化转型中保留人文关怀核心，构建人机协作的新型护理模式，确保技术应用不取代人性化照护。

articles.title: Beyond the 2025 guidelines: tailoring hypertension management to the underlying pathogenic pathway in the age of precision medicine.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出超越2025高血压指南的精准管理新策略。基于病因通路分型实现个体化治疗，通过生物标志物识别特定病理机制，为靶向药物选择提供新范式。

articles.title: Global mapping of telemedicine regulation and ethical safeguards: an exploratory document analysis.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过文件分析，首次系统梳理了全球远程医疗法规与伦理保障现状。研究发现各国监管框架差异显著，强调需建立统一伦理准则以保障数字医疗安全与公平。

articles.title: Engaging LGBTQ+ Youth in Human-Centered Design of a Digital Health Intervention via Discord: Implementation Case Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过Discord平台开展LGBTQ+青少年参与的数字健康干预设计案例。采用人本设计方法成功吸引目标群体，为开发包容性数字健康工具提供实践参考。

articles.title: A Bilayer Feature Fusion Framework for Pan-Cancer Survival Prediction Based on Multihead Attention and Adaptive Differential Privacy: Model Development and Validation Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出基于多头注意力和自适应差分隐私的双层特征融合框架。该模型能有效整合多组学数据进行泛癌生存预测，在保护隐私的同时保持较高预测精度。

articles.title: From Gene Knockouts to Genome Remodeling: Large DNA Fragment Deletion Technologies in Plants.
articles.chinese_summary: 系统总结植物大片段DNA删除技术的发展。从基因敲除到基因组重塑，这些技术可实现多位点同步编辑，为作物性状改良和功能基因组研究提供新工具。

articles.title: Engineered Bacteriophages: A Next-Generation Platform for Precision Antimicrobials and Therapeutics.
articles.chinese_summary: 综述工程化噬菌体作为精准抗菌平台的最新进展。通过基因改造可增强其靶向性和杀菌能力，为应对耐药菌感染提供新型治疗策略，具有临床应用潜力。

articles.title: Systematic analysis of photogranulation characteristics during start-up of a photogranular sequencing batch bioreactor for mariculture wastewater treatment.
articles.chinese_summary: 系统分析光颗粒序批式生物反应器处理海水养殖废水的启动特性。研究发现光颗粒形成过程具有阶段性特征，优化启动条件可显著提升系统对高盐废水的脱氮除磷效率。

articles.title: Dual-promoter control of gene expression: from transcriptional fine-tuning to antibiotic resistance.
articles.chinese_summary: 阐明双启动子调控基因表达的分子机制，揭示其在转录精细调控中的作用，并探讨该结构导致抗生素耐药性产生的新途径。

articles.title: Molecular mechanisms of plant thermal response: from signal transduction and epigenetic regulation to signaling integration.
articles.chinese_summary: 系统解析植物热应激响应的分子网络，涵盖表观遗传调控、钙信号转导等多层次机制，揭示温度信号整合的交叉对话原理。
articles.journal: Journal of genetics and genomics = Yi chuan xue bao

articles.title: Pseudomonas vancouverensis as a platform for one-carbon (C(1)) assimilation and polyhydroxyalkanoate accumulation.
articles.chinese_summary: 开发温哥华假单胞菌作为一碳同化平台，通过工程化改造高效合成聚羟基脂肪酸酯，为生物可降解塑料生产提供新型微生物底盘。

articles.title: Oncolytic Virotherapy for Solid Tumors: Clinical Advances and Future Directions.
articles.chinese_summary: 综述溶瘤病毒疗法在实体瘤治疗中的临床进展，重点分析其联合免疫疗法的协同效应及耐药机制，展望未来精准治疗方向。
articles.journal: Surgical oncology clinics of North America

articles.title: Harnessing fungal fermentation for waste-to-food conversion.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探索利用真菌发酵技术将有机废弃物转化为食用蛋白，提出一种可持续的废物资源化路径，为缓解粮食危机提供创新解决方案。

articles.title: Plant oil body engineering: A roadmap from multiscale structures to next-generation food systems.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文概述了植物油体工程路线图，从多尺度结构调控到下一代食品系统设计，旨在利用油体创新改善食品功能性和可持续性。

articles.title: Mechanistic insights into sulfate-driven performance adaptation and membrane fouling in a UASB-SBR-AXMBR system: metabolic network reconstruction and microbial community succession.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过代谢网络重建和微生物群落演替分析，揭示了硫酸盐在UASB-SBR-AXMBR系统中驱动性能适应和膜污染的机制，为废水处理优化提供新见解。

articles.title: Beyond Starch: Towards a Scalable Potato Platform for Molecular Farming.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究探索将马铃薯平台超越淀粉生产，用于分子农业规模化生产高价值化合物，为作物生物技术提供可持续替代方案。

articles.title: Inorganic-biological hybrid cell factories for biogenic inorganic biomaterials and biohybrid biomanufacturing.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章提出无机-生物杂化细胞工厂，用于生产生物源无机材料和实现生物杂化制造，创新性地融合生物与无机系统以拓展生物制造能力。

articles.title: Intracellular Measurement-Informed Multiscale Modeling for Scalable iPSC Manufacturing.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种结合细胞内测量与多尺度建模的新方法，旨在优化和扩大诱导多能干细胞的生产规模，为规模化制造提供精准指导。

articles.title: Single Molecule Force Measurements Reveal Energy Stabilization of Theophylline Aptamer RNA Switch Required for Gene Control.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过单分子力测量揭示茶碱适体RNA开关的能量稳定机制。发现特定构象变化所需的能量稳定是实现基因控制的关键，为RNA开关设计提供定量依据。

articles.title: Minor groove tetrads: a potent and versatile capping interaction for i-motif structures.
articles.chinese_summary: 发现小沟四联体是一种高效且通用的i-motif结构封端相互作用。该相互作用能显著增强i-motif稳定性，为DNA纳米技术和基因调控研究提供新思路。

articles.title: Programmable, target-induced fluorogenic CRISPR-tDeg platform for live-cell RNA visualization.
articles.chinese_summary: 开发了可编程的CRISPR-tDeg平台，通过目标RNA诱导荧光激活实现活细胞RNA可视化。该技术具有高信噪比和实时监测能力，为RNA动态研究提供新工具。

articles.title: Decoding nucleic acid contributions to phase separation and ordering in biomolecular condensates.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章解析了核酸在生物分子凝聚体相分离和有序化中的作用机制。揭示了核酸序列通过特异性相互作用调控凝聚体形成与结构，深化了对细胞组织化的理解。

articles.title: Comparative assessment of food-grade osmolytes for enhancing yeast fermentation performance under salt stress.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了多种食品级渗透剂在盐胁迫下提升酵母发酵性能的效果。发现特定渗透剂能显著增强酵母耐盐性，为高盐发酵环境提供了有效的生物保护策略。

articles.title: From CRISPR functional genomics to synthetic interventions: engineering antiviral strategies.
articles.chinese_summary: 综述从CRISPR功能基因组学发展到合成干预的抗病毒策略。核心提出基于宿主因子筛选与基因回路设计的协同方案，为应对新兴病毒威胁提供工程化解决路径。

articles.title: Synergistic enhancement of hyaluronic acid production through co-cultivation of Streptococcus zooepidemicus and Streptococcus pyogenes under differential aeration conditions.
articles.chinese_summary: 采用兽链球菌与化脓链球菌共培养及差异曝气策略协同提升透明质酸产量。创新点在于利用种间互作与氧调控双重作用，突破单菌发酵的产能限制。

articles.title: Advances in metabolic engineering of Bacillus subtilis towards high-efficiency cytidine biosynthesis.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过代谢工程改造枯草芽孢杆菌高效合成胞苷。突破在于重构核苷合成途径并动态调控关键酶表达，使产量显著提升，为微生物制造核苷类药物提供新策略。

articles.title: Stirred tank bioreactor process for chikungunya vaccine candidate VEEV-ΔC-CHIKV.
articles.chinese_summary: 开发基于VEEV-ΔC-CHIKV的基孔肯雅病毒疫苗搅拌罐生物反应器工艺。关键创新为优化悬浮培养参数实现高滴度病毒样颗粒生产，为规模化疫苗制备奠定技术基础。

articles.title: Molecular kinetics dictate population dynamics in CRISPR-based plasmid defense.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示CRISPR系统防御质粒时，分子动力学机制决定群体动态。创新点在于阐明CRISPR抗性演变不仅依赖靶向效率，更受分子结合与切割速率调控，为理解原核免疫提供新视角。
articles.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America

articles.title: Enhanced Biosynthesis of Sclareol in Yarrowia lipolytica via Systematic Metabolic Engineering.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过系统代谢工程改造解脂耶氏酵母，强化前体供应与转运效率，显著提高萜类化合物斯克莱醇的产量，为天然产物生物合成提供新方案。

articles.title: Directed Evolution of Glutamate Dehydrogenase for Oxaloacetate Amination and Biosynthesis of Aspartate-Derived Chemicals.
articles.chinese_summary: 采用定向进化技术改造谷氨酸脱氢酶，成功实现草酰乙酸氨基化并高效合成天冬氨酸衍生化学品，为生物制造开辟新路径。

articles.title: Repurposing approved drugs targeting Leishmania infantum 5-Methylthioadenosine Phosphorylase as anti-leishmanial candidates.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过药物重定位策略筛选靶向利什曼原虫5-甲基硫代腺苷磷酸化酶的已批准药物，发现多个具抗利什曼病潜力的候选化合物，为开发新疗法提供新途径。
articles.journal: Frontiers in cellular and infection microbiology

articles.title: Herpes Zoster Risk in the Era of Targeted Immunotherapy: JAK Inhibitors Versus Biologics.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究比较靶向免疫治疗时代JAK抑制剂与生物制剂对带状疱疹风险的影响，揭示不同药物类别间风险差异，为临床用药安全提供重要参考。
articles.journal: Journal of cutaneous medicine and surgery

articles.title: Treatment-Specific Prediction Models in Multiple Myeloma: A Critical Review of Current Evidence and Future Directions.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述多发性骨髓瘤治疗特异性预测模型的现状，指出现有证据的局限性，并探讨未来发展方向，旨在推动个体化精准治疗策略的优化。

articles.title: Next-Generation Therapeutic Targets in Triple-Negative Breast Cancer.
articles.chinese_summary: 系统梳理三阴性乳腺癌的下一代治疗靶点研究进展，聚焦新型分子靶标与联合疗法，为突破治疗瓶颈指明方向。

articles.title: Identification of Molecular Subtypes for Hepatocellular Carcinoma Based on Ubiquitin-Conjugating Enzyme E2 (UBE2)-Related Genes to Assess Prognosis and Immune Landscape.
articles.chinese_summary: 基于泛素结合酶UBE2相关基因构建肝细胞癌分子分型，揭示了不同亚型的预后差异及免疫微环境特征，助力个体化治疗。

articles.title: Selective Induction of Cancer Cell Pyroptosis by Erbium Nanotuner Enhances Potent Anti-Cancer Immunity.
articles.chinese_summary: 利用铒纳米调节器选择性诱导癌细胞焦亡，有效激活抗肿瘤免疫反应，为癌症免疫治疗提供了新型精准调控手段。

articles.title: Synthesis and synergistic antibacterial activity of rafoxanide derivative as a novel drug for potentiating colistin activity.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究合成了一种新型雷福尼胺衍生物，可显著增强多粘菌素的抗菌活性，为解决多重耐药菌感染提供了协同治疗新策略。

articles.title: Severe radiation-induced lymphopenia and its impact on overall survival in solid tumors: A scoping review of systematic reviews.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了严重放射性淋巴细胞减少症对实体瘤患者总生存期的影响，强调其作为独立预后因素的重要性，为优化放疗策略提供依据。
articles.journal: Journal of cancer research and therapeutics

articles.title: Core-Shell Microspheres Enabling Sustained Hydrogen Release and Peroxidase-Like Catalytic Activity for Periodontitis Therapy.
articles.chinese_summary: 研制了核壳结构微球，可实现持续释放氢气并具备类过氧化物酶催化活性，通过抗氧化和抗菌双重作用有效治疗牙周炎。

articles.title: Mechanistic insights into HapC: A key enzyme in prodiginine biosynthesis in Hahella chejuensis.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示了海藻希瓦氏菌中HapC酶在灵菌红素生物合成中的分子机制，阐明了该酶催化吡咯环形成的具体反应过程及其结构基础。

articles.title: Visible-Light-Mediated Multicomponent Synthesis of Azido-Substituted gem-Difluoroalkenes.
articles.chinese_summary: 开发了一种可见光介导的多组分合成方法，高效构建了叠氮取代的偕二氟烯烃，为含氟功能分子的制备提供了新颖且温和的合成策略。

articles.title: Incorporating ALL Biology into Treatment Decisions: Next Steps toward Targeted Therapy in Adult ALL.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨如何将成人急性淋巴细胞白血病的分子生物学特征整合到治疗决策中，强调基于疾病亚型的靶向治疗策略是提高疗效的关键发展方向。

articles.title: Telisotuzumab Adizutecan (ABBV-400), a Novel c-Met-Targeting Antibody-Drug Conjugate: First-in-Human Results in Advanced Gastric/Gastroesophageal Junction Cancer.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道了靶向c-Met的抗体偶联药物ABBV-400在晚期胃癌/胃食管结合部癌中的首次人体研究结果，展示了其在c-Met高表达患者中的初步抗肿瘤活性和可控的安全性。
articles.journal: Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research

articles.title: Astrocytes in neuroinflammation and brain cancer.
articles.chinese_summary: 综述星形胶质细胞在神经炎症和脑癌中的双重作用，揭示其通过调控微环境影响疾病进程，为治疗提供新靶点。

articles.title: Molecular subtyping-guided precision therapy for ESCC: biomarker-driven strategies and clinical translation pathways.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出食管鳞癌分子分型指导的精准治疗策略，基于生物标志物驱动疗法选择，并阐述其临床转化路径以改善患者预后。
articles.journal: Clinical & translational oncology : official publication of the Federation of Spanish Oncology Societies and of the National Cancer Institute of Mexico

articles.title: Strategies for Evading Cellular Immunity Against Recombinant AAV Vectors in Gene Therapy.
articles.chinese_summary: 探讨基因治疗中重组AAV载体规避细胞免疫的策略，包括载体工程和免疫调控，旨在提高基因疗法的安全性和持久性。

articles.title: MRI findings of ovarian microcystic stromal tumor with pathologic correlation: a case report and literature review.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过病例报告和文献综述，分析卵巢微囊性间质肿瘤的MRI特征与病理关联，为临床诊断该罕见肿瘤提供影像学依据。

articles.title: AI-driven drug-target interaction prediction: current progress, challenges, and future roadmap for precision medicine.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了AI在药物靶点相互作用预测中的进展与挑战，强调其通过提升预测精度推动精准医学发展，并规划了未来技术路线图。

articles.title: Lansoprazole Enhances Everolimus Efficacy Through DDIT3-Mediated PI3K/AKT/mTOR Pathway Inhibition in Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Neoplasms Proliferation.
articles.chinese_summary: 发现兰索拉唑通过DDIT3介导的PI3K/AKT/mTOR通路抑制，增强依维莫司对胰腺神经内分泌肿瘤的抗增殖效果。这一联合用药策略为克服治疗耐药性提供了新机制。
articles.journal: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology

articles.title: Shape-Sensing Robotic-Assisted Bronchoscopic Cryoablation for Primary and Metastatic Pulmonary Nodules: Feasibility, Safety, and Early Outcomes.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究评估形状感知机器人辅助支气管镜冷冻消融术治疗原发和转移性肺结节的可行性。初步结果显示该技术安全有效，为微创肺部肿瘤治疗提供了新选择。
articles.journal: Respiration; international review of thoracic diseases

articles.title: Transforming Acute Myeloid Leukemia Care Through Precision Medicine: Integrating Genomic Profiling, Measurable Residual Disease, and Targeted Therapies.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨如何通过精准医疗转变急性髓系白血病治疗，整合基因组分析、微小残留病监测与靶向疗法。强调个体化治疗策略可改善预后，推动白血病管理向精准化发展。

articles.title: Adaptive Feature Selection With Hierarchical Learning for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究开发了一种自适应特征选择与分层学习方法，用于药物-靶点相互作用预测。该方法通过动态筛选关键特征并分层建模，显著提高了预测准确性，为药物发现提供了高效计算策略。
articles.journal: IEEE journal of biomedical and health informatics

articles.title: A Lightweight Curriculum and Contrastive Learning Framework for Protein-Protein Interaction Prediction.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文提出一种结合课程学习和对比学习的轻量级框架，用于预测蛋白质相互作用。该框架通过渐进式学习策略和对比增强，有效提升了预测精度和泛化能力，为蛋白质功能研究提供了新工具。
articles.journal: IEEE journal of biomedical and health informatics

articles.title: EEPD1 Inhibition Unleashes Antitumor Immunity in Colorectal Cancer by Activating the cGAS-STING Pathway.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现抑制EEPD1可通过激活cGAS-STING通路激发结直肠癌的抗肿瘤免疫反应。这一机制为开发新的免疫治疗策略提供了潜在靶点，有望增强肿瘤免疫治疗效果。

articles.title: Clinical Outcomes of Cat Allergen Immunotherapy in Patients With Allergic Rhinitis: A Real-World Study.
articles.chinese_summary: 通过真实世界研究评估猫过敏原免疫疗法对过敏性鼻炎患者的临床疗效。研究证实该疗法能显著改善患者症状，为过敏性疾病的临床治疗提供了实践证据。

articles.title: Systems metabolic engineering of glutathione biosynthesis in Saccharomyces cerevisiae: Pathway balancing coupled with enzyme screening for high-titer production.
articles.summary: Glutathione (GSH), an essential tripeptide thiol critical for cellular redox regulation, has significant value in the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries. To overcome limitations of traditional GSH extraction methods, this study established a microbial cell factory platform in Saccharomyces cerevisiae through integrated metabolic engineering strategies: (1) host strain screening identified NJ-SQYY with superior GSH accumulation (74.14 mg·L⁻¹, 8.27 mg·g-1 dry cell weight [DCW]); (2) CRISPR/Cas9-mediated genomic integration of bacterial gshAB introduced with a bifunctional glutathione synthetase; (3) systematic optimization via promoter tuning and Gsh1-Gsh2 enzyme fusion, and CYS3 overexpression-resolved γ-glutamylcysteine bottlenecks. These interventions
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过CRISPR/Cas9基因组编辑、启动子调控和酶融合等技术，在酿酒酵母中构建谷胱甘肽生物合成途径。通过系统代谢工程策略优化关键酶表达，解决了γ-谷氨酰半胱氨酸合成瓶颈，建立了高效的微生物细胞工厂平台，为医药级谷胱甘肽的工业化生产提供新方案。

articles.title: Screening of molecular elements and improvement of heat resistance in a thermophilic bacterium.
articles.summary: Engineering microorganisms to withstand extreme temperatures (>80 °C) remains a critical challenge in industrial biotechnology owing to limited genetic tools and poor mechanistic understanding of microbial thermoadaptation. We aimed to develop a novel Geobacillus stearothermophilus strain with remarkable thermal resilience through an integrated approach combining adaptive laboratory evolution and rational genetic engineering. Progressive thermal adaptation (70-80 °C) followed by genome reduction generated a mutant (SL-1-80) with enhanced stability at 80 °C. Subsequent combinatorial overexpression of eight heat-associated genes (murD, cysM, grpE, groES, hsp33, hslO, hrcA, clpE) synergistically extended its survival to 85 °C. Genomic and transcriptomic analyses reveale
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过适应性进化和基因工程开发了耐热地芽孢杆菌SL-1-80，能在85°C下稳定生存。通过基因组与转录组分析揭示了热抗性机制，为工业生物技术中高温发酵和生物制造过程提供了新型微生物底盘细胞。

articles.title: Production of cycloastragenol in metabolically engineered yeast.
articles.summary: Cycloastragenol is a bioactive, high-value triterpenoid derived from Astragalus membranaceus. Conventional plant-based extraction and chemical synthesis methods are expensive. To our knowledge, this is the first report on the de novo biosynthesis of cycloastragenol in yeast. The mevalonate pathway was reconstituted in yeast peroxisomes, and the engineered yeast produced 656.55 mg/L squalene. Further introduction of heterologous enzymes led the engineered yeast to produce 1.04 mg/L cycloastragenol, which demonstrated the yeast production of value-added medicinal molecules.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过代谢工程改造酵母，实现了环黄芪醇的从头生物合成。将甲羟戊酸途径重构于酵母过氧化物酶体中，工程化酵母产量达656.55 mg/L角鲨烯，进一步引入异源酶后成功生产1.04 mg/L环黄芪醇。该技术为高价值药用分子的生物制造提供了新途径。

articles.title: An Open-Source Modular Bioreactor Platform for Cultivation of Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 and Extraction of Intracellular Glucose.
articles.summary: Rising carbon emissions have intensified the demand for sustainable biomanufacturing systems. Algae like Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 lend themselves as a promising photosynthetic machine for high carbon-capture while generating valuable bioproducts like glucose, which can serve as a feedstock for downstream biofuel applications. However, current cultivation technologies remain expensive, closed-source, and poorly suited for integrated downstream processing. This study presents a low-cost, open-source bioreactor platform with integrated modules for cultivation, chemical lysis, and glucose extraction from Synechocystis biomass. The system incorporates a photobioreactor illuminated by a programmable Godox LED, a lysis module for acid and ultrasound-based cell disruption, and a pressure-driven
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种开源模块化光生物反应器平台，用于培养聚球藻并提取胞内葡萄糖。该系统整合了培养、化学裂解和葡萄糖提取模块，通过低成本开放式设计解决了现有培养技术昂贵且封闭的问题，为可持续生物制造提供了创新解决方案。

articles.title: Advances in synthetic microbial ecosystems approach for studying ecological interactions and their influencing factors.
articles.summary: Investigating ecological interactions within microbial ecosystems is essential for enhancing our comprehension of key ecological issues, such as community stability, keystone species identification, and the manipulation of community structures. However, exploring these interactions proves challenging within complex natural ecosystems. With advances in synthetic biology, the design of synthetic microbial ecosystems has received increasing attention due to their reduced complexity and enhanced controllability. Various ecological relationships, including commensalism, amensalism, mutualism, competition, and predation have been established within synthetic ecosystems. These relationships are often context-dependent and shaped by physical and chemical environmental factors, as well as by intera
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨合成微生物生态系统方法在研究生态相互作用及其影响因素方面的进展。通过合成生物学技术构建可控微生物群落，研究共生、竞争等生态关系，对生物制造过程中的微生物群落调控和合成生物学应用具有重要参考价值。

articles.title: The Kongming defense: Host-pathogen battles take a new face.
articles.summary: Bacteria employ diverse immune systems, such as CRISPR-Cas, to fend off phage infections. A recent study uncovered the unprecedented mechanistic features of the Kongming bacterial defense system, which uniquely exploits phage-derived enzymes to synthesize deoxyinosine triphosphate (dITP), thereby triggering host immunity through NAD+ depletion. In response, some phages have evolved countermeasures to disrupt dITP synthesis, highlighting the ongoing evolutionary arms race between hosts and pathogens. This discovery not only deepens our understanding of bacterial defense strategies but also paves the way for new insights in biomedical research and synthetic biology.
articles.chinese_summary: 最新研究发现孔明防御系统通过利用噬菌体酶合成dITP触发宿主免疫，揭示了细菌-噬菌体军备竞赛新机制。该发现不仅深化了对细菌防御策略的理解，更为合成生物学工具开发和新型抗菌策略提供了理论依据，具有重要生物医学应用潜力。

articles.title: Mitral Transcatheter Edge-to-Edge Repair Using Novel Augmented Imaging Software.
articles.summary: Three-dimensional transesophageal echocardiography (3D TEE) is the primary imaging guidance tool for mitral transcatheter edge-to-edge repair (M-TEER). DeviceGuide technology is a novel investigational software program using artificial intelligence to automatically track the M-TEER device within the 3D TEE volume and reformat images to guide implantation. DeviceGuide can automatically generate multiplanar-reconstructed images that: 1) maintain target location on 3D-rendered views while imaging device location/orientation, 2) automatically generate two-dimensional orthogonal target views with real-time indicators of device position and trajectory, and 3) continuously generate a consistent two-dimensional image of the device and surrounding tissue. Automatic 3D TEE multiplanar reconstruction
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于人工智能的新型三维经食管超声成像软件，用于辅助二尖瓣经导管缘对缘修复手术。该技术能自动追踪器械位置并实时生成多平面重建图像，提高手术精准度，属于医疗器械创新在大健康领域的应用。

articles.title: Applications and challenges of multi-omics approaches in lung cancer research and precision treatment.
articles.summary: Lung cancer is one of the most common cancers worldwide and one of the leading causes of cancer death, with a heavy disease burden and severe public health challenges. Multi-omics techniques, such as genomics, proteomics, metabolomics, and radiomics, play a crucial role in the early diagnosis and treatment of lung cancer, revealing the molecular characteristics and mechanisms of lung cancer, and have significant clinical application value. However, it also faces numerous challenges, such as data issues, "black box" problems, and ethical and legal concerns. How to leverage strengths while mitigating weaknesses, achieve clinical translation of technology, and serve patients more effectively deserves our deep reflection. This article reviews the specific applications and challenges of multi-o

articles.title: A Triple-Modality Peptide-Antibiotic-Phage Therapy Eradicates Multidrug-Resistant Serratia marcescens Biofilms
articles.summary: Serratia marcescens is an opportunistic pathogen that causes severe hospital-acquired infections, notable for its biofilm formation abilities and development of extensive antibiotic resistance. Here we evaluated the efficacy of bacteriophages, antibiotics, and antimicrobial peptides (BAP), alone and in combination, against fourteen multi-drug-resistant (MDR) S. marcescens isolates sourced from hospitals and other environmental settings in an in vitro biofilm model. Phage combination with a cockt
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了噬菌体、抗生素和抗菌肽三联疗法对多重耐药粘质沙雷氏菌生物膜的清除效果。该策略针对医院获得性感染，通过创新疗法组合对抗抗生素耐药性，在新型抗感染药物开发领域具有重要价值。

articles.title: The Joint Action of Bacteriophage and Antibiotics in the Treatment of Staphylococcus aureus infections in Galleria mellonella
articles.summary: Given the global rise of antibiotic resistance, there has been a resurgence of interest in bacteriophage therapy, typically administered concomitantly with antibiotics and currently used as a last resort treatment. In this study, we use the Galleria mellonella model to investigate the treatment outcomes and dynamics of joint therapy against a toxigenic and pathogenic strain of Staphylococcus aureus. While our previous research demonstrated that single-agent therapy, whether using bactericidal or
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究利用大蜡螟模型评估噬菌体与抗生素联合治疗金黄色葡萄球菌感染的效果。针对全球抗生素耐药性问题，探索噬菌体联合用药作为最后治疗手段的潜力，属于抗感染创新疗法领域，对开发新型抗菌策略具有重要价值。

articles.title: Dynamic co-existence of bacteriophages and their hosts in the Arabidopsis thaliana phyllosphere
articles.summary: Bacterial communities and the bacteriophages infecting them are the basis of every ecosystem, including holobionts. The various ways in which these microorganisms interact with each other in complex communities over the life of the host affects the holobiont fitness. Despite being ubiquitous and environmentally relevant, plant-associated microbial communities remain understudied, especially in the phyllosphere, mainly because of the low abundance of microbes and the complexity of the system. In
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探索拟南芥叶际中噬菌体与宿主细菌的动态共存关系，揭示微生物群落互作对宿主适应性的影响。虽聚焦基础生态机制，但与创新疗法和生物制造的关联有限，主要提供环境微生物学的理论参考。

articles.title: Dormant Bacteria's Fatal Attraction to RNA Bacteriophages
articles.summary: Phages are the most abundant biological entities on Earth, yet RNA phages are strikingly scarce compared to their DNA counterparts-a long-standing mystery in phage biology. Here, we use dsRNA phage phiYY as a model to demonstrate that while RNA phages efficiently infect growing bacteria, they are gradually eliminated inside dormant bacteria through weak and time-dependent ROS-mediated damage. The RNA phages decline over days rather than through immediate clearance inside dormant bacteria. Accord
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示RNA噬菌体在休眠细菌中会随时间推移被活性氧介导的损伤逐渐清除，而非立即清除。这一发现解释了RNA噬菌体在自然界中相对稀缺的现象，主要涉及噬菌体与细菌相互作用的分子机制，属于基础生物学研究范畴。

articles.title: Functional Divergence and Conservation in the QueC Protein Family (PF06508): From tRNA Modification to Anti-Phage Defense
articles.summary: The QueC protein family (PF06508) is best known for its role in the biosynthesis of 7-deazaguanine derivatives, including the tRNA modification queuosine and the DNA base 7-cyano-7-deazaguanine (preQ0). Recent discoveries, however, reveal that this ancient scaffold has been repeatedly repurposed for distinct biological functions, including roles in anti-phage defense. Here, we combine Sequence Similarity Networks (SSN) with genomic neighborhood analyses to map the functional diversification of t
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过序列相似性网络和基因组分析，揭示了QueC蛋白家族的功能多样性。该家族不仅参与tRNA修饰和DNA碱基合成，还被重新用于抗噬菌体防御等新功能。文章主要关注基础生物学机制，与创新药和生物制造的关联有限，属于基础研究范畴。

articles.title: cDNA-guided functional selection uncovers selective defense systems against RNA phages
articles.summary: Bacteria encode diverse antiphage defense systems, yet mechanisms that target RNA phages remain comparatively underexplored. Here, we used a cDNA-based functional selection strategy to systematically identify genes that confer resistance to RNA phage infection independently of receptor variation in Pseudomonas aeruginosa. This approach uncovered previously uncharacterized antiphage defense systems, most of which are located within genomic islands, consistent with their being bona fide components

articles.title: Nucleoid-associated proteins sense phage-induced genome damage to elicit abortive infection
articles.summary: Bacteria have evolved diverse immune strategies to detect and neutralize bacteriophage infection. Here, we describe an unprecedented paradigm in which a chromosome-architecting nucleoid-associated protein (NAP) is repurposed as a viral infection sensor. When phage attack leads to genome degradation, the NAP sensor is released from the nucleoid to the cytoplasm, where it binds and activates diverse immune effectors. One such effector is a nucleotide-modifying toxin normally existing as an inactiv

articles.title: Systematic analysis of the type VII secretion system in Streptococcus gallolyticus subsp. gallolyticus reveals genomic diversity and functional associations
articles.summary: Streptococcus gallolyticus subsp. gallolyticus (Sgg) is an opportunistic pathobiont associated with bacteremia, infective endocarditis, and colorectal cancer. However, the genomic diversity of this subspecies and the distribution of key virulence determinants, particularly the type VII secretion system (T7SS), remain poorly characterized. Here, we performed genomic analyses of 76 Sgg strains from diverse geographic and host origins. Core- and pan-genome analyses, multi locus sequence typing, and

articles.title: Repurposing anti-phage defenses to differentially arrest the viral lifecycle reveals the regulatory logic of a parasitic satellite
articles.summary: Mobile genetic elements frequently encode defense mechanisms to protect their bacterial hosts from viral attack. In Vibrio cholerae, these defensive elements include phage-inducible chromosomal island-like elements (PLEs), which are phage satellites that act as highly specialized parasites of the lytic phage ICP1. While PLE transcriptional activation upon ICP1 infection is known to be temporally regulated, the underlying regulatory logic and dependencies on the progression of the phages developm

articles.title: Dissecting the genetic determinants of bacterial DNA degradation by bacteriophage T5
articles.summary: Upon infection of Escherichia coli, the virulent bacteriophage T5 employs a unique two-step mechanism to transfer its 122-kb genome: only 8% of the DNA are initially transferred, allowing expression of pre-early genes that alter host functions before the remaining DNA is delivered. Early infection triggers rapid host DNA degradation and nucleotide catabolism, processes partly controlled by the pre-early genes encoding the predicted metallo-phosphatase A1 and the dNMP phosphatase Dmp. However, th

articles.title: Pseudomonas aeruginosa balances cytotoxicity and motility to counter phagocytosis by macrophages
articles.summary: During chronic lung infections, Pseudomonas aeruginosa diversifies under selection from antibiotics, metabolic constraints, and host defenses. Macrophages are key sentinels of the innate immune system and play a central role in clearing airway pathogens. Yet, how they process heterogeneous bacterial populations remains poorly understood. Here, we investigate how P. aeruginosa evades phagocytosis under conditions that mimic chronic infection. We use an attenuated mutant lacking a functional type

articles.title: A widespread gut bacterial lineage distinguished by redox metabolism and phage defense
articles.summary: Genomic variation within gut microbial species can have consequences for host health and disease. However, for low abundance species, these variations can be difficult to capture by both culture-dependent and -independent approaches. Here, we focus on the prevalent but low abundance gut Actinomycetota Eggerthella lenta. We developed a selective media for sensitive and specific isolation of E. lenta from human stool. Genomes from 87 new E. lenta isolates were combined with prior high-quality asse

articles.title: All-trans retinoic acid recalibrates macrophage transcriptional responses to drug-resistant Mycobacterium tuberculosis through strain-specific immunometabolic reprogramming
articles.summary: Tuberculosis (TB) caused by Mycobacterium tuberculosis (M.tb) remains the leading infectious cause of death worldwide, with multidrug-resistant (MDR) and extensively drug-resistant (XDR) strains presenting an escalating therapeutic crisis. All-trans retinoic acid (ATRA), an active vitamin A metabolite with established immunomodulatory properties, has emerged as a candidate host-directed therapy, yet its genome-wide transcriptional effects on macrophage across strains of differing drug-resistance

articles.title: The transcription factor Vca0578 (DsvR) mediated expression of ZapC is required to promote cell division during lytic transglycosylase insufficiency in Vibrio cholerae
articles.summary: The bacterial peptidoglycan (PG) cell wall, a polymer made of amino-acid-bearing glycan strands, maintains cell shape, provides structural integrity, and protects against osmotic lysis. PG maintenance is an active process that requires regulated PG breakdown to make space for insertion of new PG strands. PG breakdown is accomplished by  autolysins, i.e. endogenous enzymes with cell wall cleavage activity. The lytic transglycosylases (LTGs), a class of autolysins, for example, cleave glycan stran

articles.title: Enabling the prediction of phage receptor specificity from genome data
articles.summary: Predicting which receptor a phage binds to from genome sequence alone has remained an intractable challenge, principally because the experimental phenotypic data required to train and validate predictive models have not been available at sufficient scale. Here we address this by conducting 1,050 genome-wide genetic screens across 255 taxonomically diverse Escherichia coli dsDNA phages, assigning host receptors to 193 phages across 19 receptor classes. Comparative genomics and AlphaFold3 structur

articles.title: Exploring the virome of Gyropsylla spegazziniana, a major yerba mate pest
articles.summary: The yerba mate psyllid (Gyropsylla spegazziniana) poses a significant threat to yerba mate crops, causing extensive economic losses. While some ecological aspects as well as control strategies have been studied, its associated viral diversity remains unexplored. Here, by generating the first RNA high-throughput analysis (HTS) of this pest, we explored the G. spegazziniana virome, revealing novel and diverse RNA viruses. We characterized five new viral members belonging to distinct families, with
